items.text:
⭐️NOW CASTING⭐️

The University of Michigan Entertainment Coalition -LA is proud to present a staged reading of a new feature by alum Daniel Pipski.  

Saturday, July 25th at United Talent Agency from 11a-2p.

To be a part of the magic: submit your headshot, bio and the role to : cortney.s.wright@gmail.com no later than 6p PST Wed 7/15. 

Callbacks will be no later than Thursday, July 16th. 

Virtual rehearsal on Sunday, July 19th- time TBD but will be after 4p PST. 

If cast, please plan to arrive at UTA no later than 10:15a on Saturday, July 25th. 

THERE'S ALWAYS TOMORROW — CHARACTER BREAKDOWN

RONNIE (VERONICA SHARPE)
Female, Early 20s
Brilliant, chaotic, sarcastic, and emotionally guarded. A former startup prodigy convinced Y2K will bring about the end of civilization. Lives out of her car, rejects authority, and uses humor as armor. Beneath her confidence is profound grief and loneliness.

GLENN GARRITY
Male, 30s
A hardworking tech lead who has spent years doing everything "right." Loyal, earnest, socially awkward, and desperate for approval. After losing his job and relationship in the same day, he embarks on a wild end-of-the-world adventure that forces him to let go of control.

SUPPORTING

LEILA
Female, Late 20s
Glenn's longtime girlfriend. Free-spirited, sincere, and completely unaware of how absurd her worldview sounds to others. Believes she and Glenn have been in an open relationship for years.

STEVE
Male, 40s
Glenn's charismatic boss. A polished corporate climber who makes everyone feel special while quietly looking out for himself.

HARRIS
Male, 30s
Ronnie's former business partner and ex-boyfriend. Smart, successful, and polished. Represents a painful chapter in Ronnie's past.

KATY
Female, 30s
Ronnie's former best friend and business partner. Successful, composed, and carrying unresolved history with Ronnie.

ED
Male, 30s
Leila's other boyfriend. A laid-back weed dealer who is oddly polite and well-meaning despite creating chaos wherever he goes.

DAY PLAYER / FEATURED ROLES

CONNIE
Female, 50s
Veteran accountant. Sharp, practical, and quietly amused by everyone's drama.

DAVENPORT
Male, 60s
CarCo's intimidating CEO. Old-school executive presence.

TED
Male, 20s–30s
One of Glenn's exhausted Y2K programmers. Dry sense of humor.

ROGER
Male, 50s
Corporate executive. Skeptical, confrontational, and eager to challenge Glenn.

TINO
Male, Any Ethnicity, 30s–50s
Jersey bodega owner interviewed on MTV about Y2K panic.

OLD HIPPIE LADY
Female, 60s–70s
Opinionated bank customer who gets invested in Glenn and Ronnie's argument.

TELLER
Any Gender, 20s–50s
Bank employee caught in the middle of Ronnie's chaos.

POPSTER EMPLOYEES / TECH WORKERS
20s–30s
A mix of quirky dot-com era startup employees, coders, and partygoers.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'UNIVERSITY OF MICHIGAN ENTERTAINMENT COALITION PRESENTS Daniel DanielPipski Pipski HBX Writer and producer for film and television. Pipski's credits include CO writing the film "Ticket to Paradise" (2022), starring George Clooney and Julia Roberts, and serving as an executive producer for the streaming series "The Penguin' (2024), starring Colin Farrell, for HBO Max and "A Teacher' (2020) for Hulu.'

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES LOCAL HIRE

We are currently casting the lead roles of **Cris** and **Rosa** for *Pregnant by a Demon*, a 30-minute scripted mockumentary comedy pilot shooting in Los Angeles.

**CRIS — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 18–21. Must be 18+ and able to believably portray 16. Cris is sharp, beautiful, restless, and dryly funny. She dreams of becoming more independent and escaping the chaos of her family, but beneath the sarcasm, eye rolls, and teenage defiance, she feels everything deeply. She is caught between two worlds, two languages, and two versions of herself. The role includes one brief kiss with the character of Mike.
**Works 4 days | Rate: $1,500 total**

**ROSA — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 45–65. Must be able to portray an older family matriarch through styling. Rosa is the family’s sweet-faced, sharp-tongued matriarch—warm and loving one moment, terrifying with a candle and a curse the next. She believes she is spiritually gifted, deeply misunderstood, and absolutely right about everything. Dramatic, nosy, loving, superstitious, and impossible to ignore, Rosa uses guilt, prayer, black magic, and perfectly timed insults to keep her family in line.
**Works approximately 3.5 days | Rate: $1,000 flat**

**Shoot dates:** July 20–25, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA vicinity
**Local hire only**

**Non-Union**
**Rates are all-inclusive and firm**
**Submission deadline:** July 13, 2026

Please email your **headshot, résumé, and reel** to **sheela@reigncasting.com** with the role name in the subject line.

Please **only** submit if you fit the role requirements.

Please only submit for Cris if you truly look like you can pass for high school. Submissions that do not match the requested criteria will be deleted.

We are currently casting for a strong female performer to play Jill in our adults only pantomime Jack OFF The Beanstalk opening at Scala London. We are looking for a good actress with an excellent singing voice and mover.
The rehearsals dates are the 9th to 13th November and 7th to 11th December. The playing dates are 14th December to 3rd January 2027.We are offering a good fee for all rehearsals and playing dates. Please email details including a singing reel to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'KÜNSTLERFAMILIE THEMEN-TALK So So kommst du in die Medien Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen und Eva Primavesi PR-Expertin Christoph Seidl KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Gründer'

🆕🆕🆕🥳🥳🥳
Stage & Screen
Theater trifft Kamera 

Unser neuer Schauspieworkshop für Jugendliche im Alter von 12-20 Jahren lädt dazu ein die Arbeit als Schauspieler*in auf der Bühne und vor der Kamera gleichermaßen kennenzulernen. 
Wir tauchen voll ein in beide Welten und drehen unseren ersten eigenen Kurzfilm. 🎥🥳

Sei dabei und begebe dich in das Abenteuer auf der Bühne und vor der Kamera zu stehen und finde heraus, was dir am meisten Spaß macht!🥳

Jetzt buchen! 🥳🥳🥳

📅03. und 04. August jeweils 11-15 Uhr 
📍Hafencity Hamburg 

Anmeldung und alle Infos unter:
www.claract.de 

Bei Fragen, meldet euch jederzeit sehr gerne bei mir! 

Ich freue mich auf euch! ☀️🥳🏝️🍦🐝

#ferien #schauspiel #hamburg #actress #actor

items.text:
Casting Call for a short film/thriller - female lead - Non-Union 

Compensation - Paid

Seeking an actor for the lead female role in an independent short film in the genre of a crime thriller. 

Looking for a female approximately 25-30 with dark brunette hair

Strong Screen presence and emotional range is required

This is a paid lead role for an actor who can bring authenticity, emotional depth, and a compelling on-screen presence to the character. 

Filming Location - Orange County, California 

Filming Date August 2026

To submit, please send. **

1. Name 
2. Age 
3. Recent headshot and current photos
4. Acting resume and/or demo reel (if available) 
5. Contact Information      

**Submit your materials [artisanworldstudios@gmail.com] 

**Email Subject:** FEMALE LEAD ROLE 

We look forward to seeing your submission!

topComments.text: Very interested, I would be willing to wear a realistic wig? I have dark red hair, unless thats something that could be worked with?

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Ava Frommell, and I'm the producer of **BROADCASTING 101**, a proof-of-concept television pilot filming in Bellmore, NY next week. Due to a last-minute casting change, we're urgently seeking an actor to play **RANDY FRIEDMAN**, one of our ensemble lead roles.

**Logline:**

In this mockumentary-style workplace comedy, a naively optimistic teen filmmaker leads a chaotic high school broadcasting program through constant production disasters, determined to prove that a group of misfit students can create something meaningful.

**ROLE: RANDY FRIEDMAN**
40s (Late 30s-Late 40s), Male, White, A Social Studies teacher and GCTV’s faculty advisor, though he functions more as a friend to the crew than a traditional authority figure. He is a gay, sports-obsessed Long Island staple with enough life experience and connections to fix almost any problem. He cares deeply about the program’s image—and his own—but his heart is always with the students. ENSEMBLE LEAD

**Project Details:**

Union: Non-Union
Rate: Copy/Credit/Meals Provided
Shoot Location: Bellmore, New York (Greater NYC area)
Shoot Window: July 14th-18th

If interested, please send an email to **pbtscasting@gmail.com** with your headshot or recent photo and a 60 second slate including your full name, height, confirmation of non-union status, confirmation of availability for full date range, confirmation that you’re able to work as a Long Island local, and talk about something you’re passionate about.

Please feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit. We'd love to hear from performers of all experience levels, and we're hoping to cast this role as soon as possible.

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
Hey everyone! 👋
Bit of an unusual post…

I own two unique content creation studios in South London, and I’m looking to build a small community of like-minded creatives who fancy helping each other create amazing content.

The idea is simple: every few weeks we’ll get together, shoot content, bounce ideas around, be each other’s camera operator or photographer, and then maybe grab some food or a drink afterwards. The aim is to make some great content, meet genuinely lovely people and build a supportive creator community.

It’s completely free—there’s no catch. I just think creating content is much more fun (and far easier!) when you’ve got other creative people around you.

Whether you’re into TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, UGC, photography, videography or anything else creative, it’d be great to hear from you.

If you’d like to join, please DM me with:

✨ Your phone number (I’ll put everyone into a WhatsApp group)

✨ Links to your social media

✨ A little bit about yourself—who you are, what kind of content you create (or would like to create), and anything else you’d like everyone to know.

My hope is to build a genuinely supportive community where we can all collaborate, inspire each other, make some incredible content and hopefully make some great friends along the way. 😊

items.text:
⚠️ OSTRZEŻENIE DLA DZIEWCZYN – UWAŻAJCIE! ⚠️

Chcę opisać sytuację, która spotkała mnie dziś, żeby żadna z Was nie dała się zmanipulować.

Napisała do mnie na Facebooku osoba przedstawiająca się jako Katarzyna Czech, twierdząc, że pracuje w dziale marketingu TVN i prowadzi nabór na modelki. Poproszono mnie o kontakt przez e-mail casting.modelki@interia.pl, a następnie zadzwonił do mnie mężczyzna.

Na początku wypytywał o wzrost, wagę i rozmiar buta. Chwilę później zażądał, żebym natychmiast wysłała zdjęcia w białych stringach. Odmówiłam. Mimo to nadal nalegał i zaczął pytać, jaki mam inny kolor bielizny, żeby zrobić zdjęcia w tej, którą posiadam.

Następnie zaczął nalegać, żebym podała dokładny adres zamieszkania, twierdząc, że przyjedzie przedstawiciel zrobić mi zdjęcia. Odmówiłam podania adresu, ponieważ nie podaję obcym ludziom danych mojego domu rodzinnego.

Nr telefonu sprawcy : +48 788 696 318
Kiedy poprosiłam o oficjalną stronę internetową lub jakikolwiek sposób zweryfikowania firmy, rozmówca zrobił się bardzo niemiły. Usłyszałam, że jestem niepoważna i nieprofesjonalna, po czym rozłączył się.

Nie wiem, kim były te osoby i nie mogę potwierdzić, czy rzeczywiście miały jakikolwiek związek z TVN. Opisuję wyłącznie to, co wydarzyło się podczas rozmowy. Dlatego apeluję:

❌ Nie wysyłajcie zdjęć w bieliźnie nieznanym osobom.
❌ Nie podawajcie swojego adresu zamieszkania.
❌ Zawsze proście o oficjalną stronę internetową, firmowy e-mail i możliwość zweryfikowania osoby, z którą rozmawiacie.
❌ Jeśli ktoś wywiera presję, obraża Was za zadawanie pytań lub żąda natychmiastowego wysłania zdjęć – zakończcie kontakt.

topComments.text: TVN i inne duże stacje zawsze wysyłają maile z własnych służbowych skrzynek używających ich hostów, żadne gmaile Interie i inne

Plus kolega z TVN powiedział ze u nich castingami kobiecymi zajmują się tylko kobiety i to bezpośrednio. Do tego castingi trwają tylko wyznaczony czas i można znaleźć informacje bezpośrednio u nich. Do tego na ten rok jest już po

Cofnięto wysłanie wiadomości a'

items.text:
*Casting for an upcoming student short film*

Looking for an elderly actress aged 70 and above to play a patient in a hospital. One day of filming in a London hospital located in Finchley. Needs to be able to act for a sunrise scene.

A short summary of our project
Set during the COVID -19 pandemic, There Is Still Hope follows Sarah, a doctor struggling to rebuild her life after the loss of her partner. While balancing the relentless demands of the hospital with raising her 12 year old daughter, Sarah dedicates herself to caring for her patients even as she quietly wrestles with grief and uncertainty. Her outlook begins to change when she forms a profound connection with an elderly patient receiving end-of-life care. Despite facing her final chapter, the patient approaches each day with warmth, and an enduring sense of hope that challenges Sarah’s increasingly fragile view of the world. A realistic and emotionally resonant drama, the film explores grief, resilience, and the transformative power of human connection.

London 
Food and Travel paid for

Interested? Email melissa.rienda@hotmail.com and rosiepaulinejones@gmail.com

items.text:
Casting call

Short Drama Filming

7-day shoot in Qingdao, early August

⚠️Both male and female leads must speak Spanish fluently. A character audition will be required upon confirmation of the role.

1️⃣Male Lead (Approximately 25 years old, must speak Spanish, handsome, and charismatic)

2️⃣Female Lead (Approximately 18 years old, beautiful and charming, excellent figure, all types are welcome)

To apply, please send your model card + photo + short drama filming video + Spanish self-introduction video.

💰20,000 RMB for a 7-day package, 14 hours/day. Overtime will be charged at the average rate.

We will provide flight, hotel,meals

Applications accepted nationwide. Please indicate your city in the application notes.

contact me facebook or tonieway@gmail.com

items.text: Over and above looking for actors for my play ‘The Presentation’ I plan to produce a play about Althea Gibson the first black tennis player to win Wimbledon. I have been developing the  project for six years and have written two plays ‘Althea’ and ‘Althea Gibson and the ball boy’ - it is ‘Althea’  I want to begin with. Rather than arrange a theatre and production dates I’m going to look for actors first. The play will be in London for a week in 2027 and ITC rates will apply and requires a black female actor playing in her 20s and a female black actor in her 60s. Enquiries to rogergoldsmith67@gmail.com

items.text:
Hello! Dan Bell Casting is casting Multi-Generational Latinx/Hispanic families for a national commercial.

Must be located in Los Angeles and native Spanish speakers! 

Please email us for self-tape audition instructions at danbellcastingoutreach@gmail.com.

SAG Commercial - (Pays each person approx. $830/day)

Auditions: ASAP

Fitting: 7/26/26-7/27/26

Shoots: 7/28/26-7/31/26

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Criteria:

1. Married Couple/Parents Ages 38-50

2. Two children ages 10-18 

3. An uncle/aunt ages 38-50

4. Their child (the cousin) ages 15-20 

5. One Grandparent ages 60-75

🎬 **CASTING EPIZODYŚCI | WARSZAWA | 31.07 piątek **

💰 **Stawka:** 300 zł netto
⏱️ **Czas pracy:** ok. 2 godziny
📱 **Projekt:** TikTok APAP
📄 **Prawa:** 12 miesięcy

**1. Alternatywna dziewczyna (ok. 30 lat)**
• Polka
• Kolorowe lub ciemne włosy
• Piercing i/lub tatuaże
• Wyrazisty, alternatywny styl

**2. Chłopak z siłowni (25–30 lat)**
• Polak
• umięśniona sylwetka
• Może być łysy
• Tatuaże 

**3. Luźny chłopak (20–25 lat)**
• Polak
• Dłuższe włosy
• Swobodny, młodzieżowy styl

**Nie odpowiadam na zgłoszenia przez FB.**

✅ 3 aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki
✅ wideowizytówkę

📧 **[iza@wizja.co](mailto:iza@wizja.co)**

items.text:
🎬 FREE AUDITION LOG FOR ACTORS
I created a simple audition log that I thought some of you might find useful.

When I first moved to LA, I had 80 auditions in my first three months. Keeping a log made it much easier to stay organised, track my progress, and remember which casting directors I’d read for.

It’s an easy way to keep track of:
• The project
• The type of role
• The audition date
• The casting director
• Whether you got a callback or booked the role
• Notes and feedback
• How many auditions you’re actually getting

I find it’s much easier to spot patterns and see your progress when everything is in one place.

And it’s FREE.

If you’d like a copy:

1. Comment AUDITION below.
2. Send me a DM.

I’ll send it over. 😊

sharedPost.text:
Verdient ist verdient.

Gestern, am 08. Juli 2026, fanden in den Berliner und Brandenburger Grundschulen zahlreiche Abschlussveranstaltungen zur feierlichen Übergabe der Zeugnisse für die Sechstklässler statt, die ab dem nächsten Schuljahr 2026/ 2027 an die Oberschulen wechseln werden.
 
Zweiundzwanzig glückliche Kinder der Klasse 6a einer Lichtenberger Schule hatten besonderes Glück, denn sie fanden zum Abschied in ihren Zeugnismappen das erste Album der Synthi-Pop-Band BEYOND OBSESSION "Listen, Learn And Speak".

Wie kam es dazu ?

Durch Beziehungen hörten Nils und Marco von einer Klasse, die öfter während längerer Pausen heimlich auf dem Smartboard Videos der Band öffnete, sich immer wieder ein Video-Post des Fanclubs ansahen, bis etliche Schüler es auswendig nachsprechen konnten, zu "In My Blood" tanzten oder Beyond Obsession-Melodien im Unterricht vor sich hin sangen oder gar im öffentlichen Personennahverkehr fremde Menschen auf die Synthi-Band aufmerksam machten.

Beide Künstler fanden dies so witzig, dass sie nicht nur jedem Kind dieser Schulklasse spontan eine handsignierte CD schenkten, sondern obendrein eine namentliche Widmung hinzufügten.

An einem Sonntagnachmittag überreichte der Keyboarder Marco Bartz den CD-Karton an den Fanclub, der die Tonträger dann am Montag in die Schule brachte.

Nachdem am Abschiedsmittwochtag den vielen Gästen in der dicht gefüllten Turnhalle von der Vorgeschichte der CD-Geschenke berichtet worden war, klatschten alle Kinder, Eltern, Großeltern und die anwesenden Lehrkräfte und Erzieher spontan Beifall.

Tom Meeloo

CASTING ‼️

Zostań Queen of Poland 2026 

Dziewczyny! 👑
Piękne, odważne, pełne energii to właśnie Was szukamy!

Gorący klimat, mega emocje i szansa na koronę, a wszystko będzie emitowane na Polsacie! 📺
Już niedługo kolejny casting to może być Twoja szansa!👑

Zgłoś się teraz na:
📩 biuro@maxima-models.pl
Wyślij nam swoje zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki oraz napisz coś o sobie. 

Kto wie? Może to będzie Twój rok?

Na finalistki czekają:
✨ zgrupowanie w wyjątkowej, słonecznej destynacji
✨ występ na antenie Polsatu
✨ możliwość nawiązania współpracy z markami oraz rozpoczęcia kariery w modelingu
✨profesjonalne sesje zdjęciowe
✨ współpraca z renomowanymi stylistami
✨rozwój wizerunku, pewności siebie i umiejętności scenicznych
✨wyjątkowe znajomości i wspomnienia, które pozostaną na lata

Queen of Poland 2026 to przestrzeń dla kobiet, które chcą się rozwijać, inspirować innych i odważnie sięgać po swoje marzenia.

Zaobseruj nas na Instagramie, aby być na bieżąco 👇🏽

Poszukuję mężczyzny w wieku około 65+ do zagrania roli **dziadka** w teledysku. To emocjonalna postać oparta na motywie **tęsknoty**, dlatego mile widziane będzie doświadczenie aktorskie.

items.text:
📣 ACTOR CALLOUT 🥂

Looking for our perfect Roger and David to star in the debut of *Speech, Speech* at SE Fest in London! 

Please follow the link below to submit your lovely self-tapes, as well as to find the audition pack:

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header)

If you have any additional access requirements, or any further questions then please message me directly, or email [tristan.simpson99@gmail.com](mailto:tristan.simpson99@gmail.com) 📧

Share far and wide with anyone you feel would be a good fit! 

We can’t wait to see them, go crazy with it  👀 🤪

Share far and wide with anyone you feel would be a good fit! 

We can’t wait to see them, go crazy with it  👀 🤪

items.text:
CASTING | THAILAND
We are looking for a male actor around 40 years old who is a native speaker of American English, with a clear, neutral American accent.

Project Details:

• Fee: THB 98,000 / USD 3,000

• Location: Thailand

• 1 shooting day

• Flights covered by the production

• Own wardrobe required

• Payment in cash on the shooting day

• The footage cannot be used in a personal portfolio

PLEASE APPLY VIA DIRECT MESSAGE ONLY.

DO NOT APPLY IN THE COMMENTS.

Please include:

• Recent photos

• Your current location

• Your WhatsApp number (if available)

Selected candidates will be invited to record a self-tape.

We look forward to hearing from you!

# **🎥 CASTING CALL - PAID (up to $500)**

Looking to cast actors, TikTok creators, or confident on-camera personalities for a social media video project.

Time commitment: Flexible, from 1 hour to up to 20 hours/week
Pay: $25/hour, up to $500/week

Content will be short, simple lifestyle scenes with everyday dialogue.

Apply: [https://tinyurl.com/short-form-media-casting](https://tinyurl.com/short-form-media-casting)

All ages, ethnicities, and backgrounds are encouraged to submit.

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Giovanni, and I'm a fashion & portrait photographer from the Netherlands. I'll be visiting **Berlin from July 20th to July 22nd**, and I'm looking to collaborate with a **male model (18+), tall, athletic/muscular build**, for an intimate, editorial-style direct flash photoshoot.

My photography is inspired by 90s fashion campaigns, with a candid, classy, and cinematic aesthetic. This is **not** an explicit shoot, but it is sensual and fashion-oriented.

If you're interested or know someone who might be a great fit, feel free to send me a message!

📍 Berlin, Germany
📅 July 20 to July 22
📸 Instagram: **@giotimoteo**

  TRAIN45: Summer Jump 2026

  Gentlemens Rockabilly  mit 
Sievert Ahrend, Reinhard de Witt und Ernst Wiemer 

Ob von Deutsch zu Englisch, ob von Country zu Rockn`Roll, ob von Banjo zu Gitarre; hier ist nix gehupft wie gesprungen, sondern es geht ab mit z.T. neuen Songs, veränderten Arrangements und einem Ernst Wiemer am Saxophon on Top!

Freitag, d. 04. September 2026, 20 Uhr
Samstag, d. 05. September 2026, 20 Uhr
Kulturspeicher Leer

Haushaltswaren Hibben ☎️ 0491-928690, 
Sievert Ahrend ☎️ 0491-3077,
 📱 0172-4579778,
Email: sievert.ahrend@gmx.de 
und (wenn noch vorhanden) an der Abendkasse.

items.text:
Wczorajszy podjazd w MG Stunts Company Poland wraz z coachem/kaskaderem Mateuszem zdałem mogę nie skromnie stwierdzić, raczej wzorowo. Pady z Judo na każdy możliwy sposób, techniki stójkowe tj. kombinację prostych, haków i sierpów, filmowe markowanie ciosów rodem z serii filmów Rocky, ćwiczenia ogólnosprawnościowe, wszystko to poszło na miękko i na wdechu. 

☯️  

Mateusz to świetnie przygotowany człowiek do swojej roli. Podobnie jak ja, też wywodzi się z Taekwon-do i jest posiadaczem czarnego pasa 2 dan. Jest to chyba pierwsza persona, która bierze na poważnie temat Kina Akcji w Polsce, której jesteśmy ciężkimi zwolennikami, czego nie można rzecz o polskich reżyserach, którzy podobno są z goła odmiennego zdania, uznając, że to ''zbyt amerykańskie'', co jest w dobie dzisiejszych czasów uważam absurdem ponieważ  dziś 90% zjawisk w Polsce począwszy od nowomowy po wszędobylskie apki jest amerykańskie. 

Niemniej jednak obydwaj jesteśmy zdania, że Kino Akcji ma w Polsce całkiem sporą szansę, a kaskaderzy w MG Stunts Company Poland są tego żywym dowodem. 💪✊🔥

Dzięki Mati i do zobaczenia na technikach kicków 👊

TAEKW☯️N !

@obserwujący
@liderzy wśród fanów

#miejskistylbyciasportowytrybżycia

items.text:
Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do ról:

1. Roman (44) – pedof*l, zwabia dzieci do vana. Niepozorny, przeciętny wygląd, nie ma nic szczególnego. Spokojny, cierpliwy, metodyczny w działaniu. Nie jest agresywny, ale jest dziwny i creepy.  AKTOR  - KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Daty: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1400 zł netto za całość

2. Marek (60) – Krzepki starszy mężczyzna, zadbany, Na pierwszy rzut oka życzliwy, spokojny senior, aktywny w lokalnej społeczności. W rzeczywistości zwolennik twardych metod wychowawczych, zamknął wnuczkę w piwnicy, żeby ją „naprostować”. 
Data: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1400 zł netto za całość

3. Pijaczek  (42) – miejscowy alkoholik, stały bywalec sklepu. Zaniedbany, w brudnych ubraniach. Prostolinijny, bezpośredni.
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

4. Sklepikarz (36) – właściciel sklepu monopolowego. Arogancki, impulsywny, wulgarny.
Data: 22.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Paweł (38) – ojciec 10-latki. Postawny, udaje, że ma pieniądze, a jest spłukany. Wybuchowy, arogancki, przekonany o swojej wyższości.  
Data: 21.07
Stawka: 600 zł netto

6. Dorian (34) – kafar, duży, można się go bać, lubi dbać o wygląd. Szybki, umie biegać. Poszukiwany listem gończym za rozboje i włamania. 
Data: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1200 zł netto

7. Tata Olafa (40) – przystojny, pomocny.
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

8. Dres 1 (20) – zwinny, w dresie, wulgarny. 
Data: 22.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

9. Dres 2 (22) – grubszy, w dresie, pewny siebie 
Data: 22.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

10. Ludwik (60) – stateczny, spokojny, nieco zlękniony mężczyzna
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

GWCI is seeking people to portray young (20s-30s) hip/cool/edgy Nightclub Patrons for Paramount Pictures psychological thriller THE BUREAUCRAT 💃🎶
To submit, email all the following to njfilm@gwcnyc.com with the subject line “IG - NIGHTCLUB PATRONS”:
- your name
- phone number 
- are you SAG or NONSAG?
- age range 
- height, weight, clothing & shoe sizes 
- are you available for the tentative work date? 
- attach a few RECENT, clear photos of yourself 
#gwciseeking #EXTRAS #youngpeople #clublife

items.text:
DANCER OPEN CALL for Awakening at Wynn Las Vegas

*It is not necessary to submit your information before attending an open call*

Las Vegas on Monday, July 27, 2026
Millennium Dance Complex Las Vegas
6675 South Tenaya Way, suite 120
Las Vegas, NV 89113

Men at 10:00a, sign in at 9:30a
Ladies at 11:30a, sign in at 11:00a

Final Callbacks Will Be Held On Tuesday, July 28 in Las Vegas

Please bring a hard copy of your headshot/resume
Please wear form-fitting clothing, no baggy clothes
Flat shoes/sneakers please- ladies please also bring heels

21+ only please

May vary in height between 5'4" - 6'3" 

All performers must be willing to relocate to Las Vegas for a one-year contract (relocation package provided)

Benefits from eligible date of hire

Must be authorized to work in the U.S.

This is a non-union production

Please submit online if unable to attend an open call:

[Awakening.castingcrane.com](http://awakening.castingcrane.com/)

Final Callbacks Will Be Held On Tuesday, July 28 in Las Vegas

Please bring a hard copy of your headshot/resume
Please wear form-fitting clothing, no baggy clothes
Flat shoes/sneakers please- ladies please also bring heels

21+ only please

May vary in height between 5'4" - 6'3" 

All performers must be willing to relocate to Las Vegas for a one-year contract (relocation package provided)

Benefits from eligible date of hire

Must be authorized to work in the U.S.

This is a non-union production

Please submit online if unable to attend an open call:

[Awakening.castingcrane.com](http://awakening.castingcrane.com/)
items.title: DANCER OPEN CALL for Awakening at Wynn Las Vegas

**CASTING: DAE Haircare Campaign**

I'm currently casting for an upcoming DAE Haircare campaign and looking for **3 female models**.

**Shoot Date:** July 30th

**Location:** Los Angeles (studio)

**Rate:** $1,200 (12 hour day)

Looking for models ages **25–35** with **beautiful, healthy hair** who are comfortable having their hair styled on camera (including heat tools and hair products).

Seeking:
* Interesting, unique faces
* Diverse looks and features
* All body types (including curvier options)
* Models with standout, healthy hair

Hair direction includes:
* Sleek / straight styles
* Smooth, bouncy blowouts
* Natural wavy looks

Please DM me with submissions including:
* Current photos/digitals
* Hair photos/videos (natural hair preferred)
* Agency/contact information
* Availability

items.text:
Looking for FEATURED EXTRAS for a short film shooting this Sunday!

Title: "The Remaking of Angela"

Logline: On the brink of losing everything, a broke fledgling writer guided by her hero, dives into a short film contest with her best friends only to find their amatuer efforts derailed by a longtime rival, and maybe even the law. 

When: Sunday, July 12th

8:30 AM - 11:30 AM

Who: This film features a black woman protagonist, and we're especially looking for diverse people of all ages for this scene! A good opportunity for aspiring actors, those new to Denver, or anyone looking to meet new people and network with local indie filmmakers.

Wear: The film is set in the mid-late 1990s. Anything that could pass for that era is preferred.

Come drop by for a few hours in the morning and have fun with us on set!

If interested, please fill out this form, and we'll be in touch to confirm:
items.title: The Remaking of Angela Extras 7/12

We're back! Submissions are open for World Monologue Games 2026!

World Monologue Games is a global acting competition and virtual showcase, allowing professional and budding actors from anywhere in the world to participate. 

Video submissions. Free entry. Cash prizes. Be seen by industry professionals and leaders.

Submission deadline Thu 13th August 2026.
Sign up now to participate:

items.text:
Hello fellow filmmakers!

Are you interested in a great film opportunity for your Independent film?

My company Sacco Studios is building a digital platform that provides a novel opportunity to potentially get your independent film into theaters in prime time slots! Our focus has been to bridge the gap between independent filmmakers and theaters that will benefit both parties at little to no risk for either one! In this prototype phase, we are looking for founding filmmakers to furnish quality films that will form the foundation of our content. If you have a feature-length film you’d like to submit (we are not taking shorts, scripts, or documentaries) or would like more information please email us at Contact.SaccoStudios@gmail.com with a few sentences about yourself and a trailer to one (or more!) of your feature films. We will be having a zoom meeting where we will go into more detail about the opportunity as well. Date and Time to be determined by scale of interest. 

This is a great opportunity to get your film seen and to be a part of the future of film in the age of the internet! 

We look forward to hearing from you!

Hi everyone!
Our independent theater group is preparing a presentation of selected scenes from Luigi Pirandello’s Six Characters in Search of an Author. I’m looking for someone to run the lights and sound during the rehearsals and performance. Experience with ETC Nomad is preferred.

Schedule:

July 21 and 22 — rehearsals from 3:00 to 6:00 PM

July 24 — performance from 5:00 to 9:00 PM

Location: John DeSotelle Studio, Hell’s Kitchen

Total budget: $180

Please message me if you’re interested or know someone who may be available.

7326209690

raurahimova@gmail.com

📸** Suche Fotograf:in für Model-Digitals / Polaroids**

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich suche jemanden, der professionelle **Model-Digitals / Polaroids** von mir fotografieren kann – idealerweise im Studio mit cleanem Tageslicht-Look. Die Bilder sind für meine Sedcard und Bewerbungen bei Modelagenturen.

**TFP wäre super**, alternativ zahle ich auch gerne eine faire Aufwandsentschädigung.

Falls jemand Interesse hat oder jemanden empfehlen kann, freue ich mich über eine Nachricht. 😊

⸻

Hi everyone! 👋

I’m looking for a photographer to shoot a set of professional **model digitals / polaroids**, ideally in a studio with a clean natural daylight look. The photos will be used for my modeling portfolio and agency applications.

**TFP would be great**, but I’m also happy to pay a reasonable fee if preferred.

Feel free to message me if you’re interested or know someone who might be a good fit. Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m Nanda, a Berlin-based Fashion, Beauty & Portrait Photographer with over 15 years of experience. I’m currently looking for opportunities in Photography, Photo Retouching/Editing, or Social Media Content Management anywhere in Germany.

I have about 4 months left on my Opportunity Card (Chancenkarte) and will be applying for an extension at the end of this month. A job in my field would also help me transition to a German work visa.

At the moment, I’m working part-time in a German restaurant while actively searching for a creative role.

If you know of any openings or can refer me, I’d truly appreciate your support.

🌐 Portfolio: https://nandasphotography.com

📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nanda.prophotographer

✨ Fashion & Beauty: https://www.instagram.com/eurofashion.nanda

Thank you so much! 🙏

Poszukujemy wysokich, dobrze zbudowanych mężczyzn do udziału w undergroundowym performansie/pokazie mody, którego centralnym elementem będzie partia szachów rozgrywana z udziałem żywych figur. Poszukujemy również łysego mężczyzny do jednej z ról w performansie.

Próby: 15–16 lipca

Pokaz: 17 lipca

Z racji, że to nasze pierwsze takie przedsięwzięcie, wynagrodzenie będzie symboliczne.

items.text:
Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do ról:

1. Roman (44) – pedof*l, zwabia dzieci do vana. Niepozorny, przeciętny wygląd, nie ma nic szczególnego. Spokojny, cierpliwy, metodyczny w działaniu. Nie jest agresywny, ale jest dziwny i creepy.  AKTOR  - KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Daty: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1400 zł netto za całość

2. Marek (60) – Krzepki starszy mężczyzna, zadbany, Na pierwszy rzut oka życzliwy, spokojny senior, aktywny w lokalnej społeczności. W rzeczywistości zwolennik twardych metod wychowawczych, zamknął wnuczkę w piwnicy, żeby ją „naprostować”. 
Data: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1400 zł netto za całość

3. Pijaczek  (42) – miejscowy alkoholik, stały bywalec sklepu. Zaniedbany, w brudnych ubraniach. Prostolinijny, bezpośredni.
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

4. Sklepikarz (36) – właściciel sklepu monopolowego. Arogancki, impulsywny, wulgarny.
Data: 22.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Paweł (38) – ojciec 10-latki. Postawny, udaje, że ma pieniądze, a jest spłukany. Wybuchowy, arogancki, przekonany o swojej wyższości.  
Data: 21.07
Stawka: 600 zł netto

6. Dorian (34) – kafar, duży, można się go bać, lubi dbać o wygląd. Szybki, umie biegać. Poszukiwany listem gończym za rozboje i włamania. 
Data: 21 i 22.07
Stawki: 1200 zł netto

7. Tata Olafa (40) – przystojny, pomocny.
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

8. Dres 1 (20) – zwinny, w dresie, wulgarny. 
Data: 22.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

9. Dres 2 (22) – grubszy, w dresie, pewny siebie 
Data: 22.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

10. Ludwik (60) – stateczny, spokojny, nieco zlękniony mężczyzna
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
SHARE! SHARE!SHARE! 

NOW CASTING: Mother & Daughter Duos for a Claire's Ad Campaign

Do you have a teenage daughter between the ages of 7-10 who has never had her ears pierced?

We're looking for Los Angeles-area mother/daughter duos to participate in an upcoming ad campaign for Claire's.

Requirements:

Daughter must be between 13–16 years old

Daughter has never had her ears pierced

Must be willing to have her ears pierced as part of the campaign

Must be located in the Los Angeles area

Compensation:

$600 for Mom

$600 for Daughter

If your shoot is selected for social media use, you will each receive an additional $2,500

To Apply:

Please record a short selfie video featuring both of you telling us:

Who you are

Why you'd like this opportunity

Why getting your ears pierced is meaningful or exciting to you

Please include:

Names

Ages

Phone number(s)

We can't wait to meet you!

Email your video to: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

Everyone In LA

We are looking for boys and girls aged between 8-18. The auditions close on the 15th July! Please read the document below for more information. 

https://docs.google.com/document/d/11FvgyRefGDD7H0EsfoNuW7tvydKAEN047QQGAJsEryw/edit?usp=drivesdk

items.text:
It's Monday, and we want to flood the feed with positivity!

True motivation doesn't just come from within—it comes from lifting each other up. We want to dedicate today to celebrating the incredible talent right here in our community.

**Let’s lift each other up:** 👇

Tag a fellow actor, filmmaker, crew member, or creative friend in the comments who inspired you recently, smashed a self-tape, or is simply putting in the hard graft.

Give them a quick shout-out and tell us why they are brilliant! Let’s fill this week with positive vibes only. Over to you...

topComments.text: My acting coach loved my latest self tape. He said he can see my confidence improving now i am being cast in roles. Yes  also been cast in a film. Really can't wait.

items.text:
In my ten years of taking headshots across England and Wales, i've seen many changes in styles and trends. You'll often see hands in headshots now, and what is actually a mid-length photo being labelled a 'headshot'. Chairs in headshots, as well as jewellery, heavy makeup and all manner of accessories.

In spite of these changes, i've always kept mine exactly the same. I've shot over 2,850 actors in natural, outdoor light. In the convenience of their back garden and cropped to the head and shoulders with minimal 'props' or distractions. A soft-focus background for a touch of 'on set context' and a tack-sharp focus on the actor's eyes.

Most of my customers return annually. Why? Because my tried and tested style works, and importantly it produces castings. I cover every single town and village in all of England and Wales, and as far as i'm aware i'm the only photographer to offer such convenience.

For information and bookings, here is the website. Alternatively, message me for more details 😃📷

www.chriskeenanheadshots.com

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY NON PROFIT

14.07-18.07 WARSZAWA, SKIERNIEWICE

Krótki metraż z humorem opowiada historię stereotypu ojca postawionego w realiach systemu kaucyjnego. Film przedstawia powstałe przez zachowanie ojca problemy rodzinne oraz wynikającą z tego relację, zdanego na siebie rodzeństwa.

Do etiudy do portfolio do Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukiwanych jest 

czterech MĘŻCZYZN W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli ojca, dwóch jego kolegów i sąsiada

dwie KOBIETY W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli sąsiadki ojca oraz żony jednego z jego znajomych

DZIEWCZYNA W WIEKU 19-24 LAT, do roli siostry

dwóch CHŁOPAKÓW W WIEKU 16-20 LAT do roli brata i jego znajomego

MAŁY CHŁOPIEC W WIEKU 8-12 LAT do roli dziecka spacerującego na chodniku

Proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej, na telefon: 607075035, lub na maila slawinskiantoni23@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.text:
🎵 WARSZAWA | 30.06 | próby NOWEGO PROGRAMU MUZYCZNEGO 🎵

Szukamy mężczyzn do udziału w próbach kamerowych nowego programu muzycznego!

🎤 Wciel się w uczestnika jednej z drużyn i poczuj dreszczyk emocji, biorąc udział w muzycznym teleturnieju. Twoim zadaniem będzie odgadywanie utworów i piosenek.

💰 Wynagrodzenie: 120 zł (płatne po realizacji).

📧 Zgłoszenia: ludzie@unagimedia.pl

📌 W tytule wiadomości wpisz: H30

W treści wiadomości podaj:

imię i nazwisko,

wiek,

numer telefonu,

zdjęcie portretowe.

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń! 🎶

Jodi Purdy Casting Director seeks Sophisticated & Intelligent Model-type Beautiful Non-Union Actresses (25-35) with Resumes & Reels (if available) for upcoming PAID Commercials!! 

All Ethnicities Welcome! 

Filming in Greater Boston area!!

Must know how to Act On-Camera and Take Direction On Set.

Must be Camera Ready with Hair, Make Up, Wardrobe.

Must be Punctual. 

Must be Professional!

Must Understand this is a Job not a Social Networking Event!

Submit:

Name
Cell
Email
Location
Photos
Resume
Reels
Videos
1 Minute Video Introduction 

Do Not Send Filtered or Touched Up Photos

Do Not Send Links to Portfolios

To:
JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com
Subject:  NU Actress 25-35

GWCI is seeking people to portray young (20s-30s) hip/cool/edgy Nightclub Patrons for Paramount Pictures psychological thriller THE BUREAUCRAT 💃🎶
To submit, email all the following to njfilm@gwcnyc.com with the subject line “IG - NIGHTCLUB PATRONS”:
- your name
- phone number 
- are you SAG or NONSAG?
- age range 
- height, weight, clothing & shoe sizes 
- are you available for the tentative work date? 
- attach a few RECENT, clear photos of yourself 
#gwciseeking #EXTRAS #youngpeople #clublife

🟣 TEATR MŁODEGO WIDZA Z WOLIMIERZA POSZUKUJE AKTORÓW! 🟣
🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego, naucz się aktorstwa od profesjonalnych aktorów od razu na scenie i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

🔹 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

🔹 OFERUJEMY:
✅ pracę od połowy września 2026 do czerwca@ 2027(z możliwością przedłużenia)
✅ granie 2 tygodnie w miesiącu (pon–pt)
✅ atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie
✅ spektakle w całej Polsce
✅ transport i noclegi w trasie
✅ profesjonalne szkolenia z teatru formy (maski, lalki)
✅ rozwój artystyczny w kreatywnym zespole

🔹 OCZEKUJEMY:
🎙️ dobrej dykcji
🎯 dyspozycyjności na próbach we Wrocławiu od sierpnia
🎭 zaangażowania i odpowiedzialności

📧 Wyślij CV ze zdjęciem:
teatrmlodegowidza@o2.pl
📞 Kontakt: 600 236 767

📌 Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi kandydatami

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY NON PROFIT

14.07-18.07 WARSZAWA, SKIERNIEWICE

Krótki metraż z humorem opowiada historię stereotypu ojca postawionego w realiach systemu kaucyjnego. Film przedstawia powstałe przez zachowanie ojca problemy rodzinne oraz wynikającą z tego relację, zdanego na siebie rodzeństwa.

Do etiudy do portfolio do Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukiwanych jest 

czterech MĘŻCZYZN W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli ojca, dwóch jego kolegów i sąsiada

items.text:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

‼️ WARSZAWA 14-15 LIPCA ‼️
Na plan trzeciego sezonu kultowego serialu historycznego którego akcja dzieje się w latach 40, na plany DZIENNO-NOCNE poszukujemy:

 ▪️ MĘŻCZYZN jako gości/obsługę hotelu. OBOWIĄZKOWO Panowie muszą być bez zarostu oraz długich włosów 

SĄ TO PLANY DZIENNO-NOCNE! Wyjazd w dniu 14.07 ok godz. 14/15 z centrum. Plan odbywa się w okolicach Garwolina- zapewniamy transport w dwie strony. Stawka za dwa dni zdjęciowe wynosi 350zł gotówką po planie.  

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami sylwetki oraz włosów z boku oraz WYMIARAMI (wzrost, but, klatka i pas) przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując “PLAN”

items.text:
Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do ról:

1. Arleta (35) – mama 10- latki, roztrzęsiona, przestraszona, plotkara.  
Data: 21.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

2. Justyna (36) – matka 10-latki. Zmęczona, nerwowa, szybko wpada w panikę. Nie znosi byłego męża. AKTORKA
Data: 21 i 22.07
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

3. Mariola (54) – sąsiadka, roztrzęsiona, ubrana na kolorowo. 
Data: 25.07
Stawki: 400 zł netto

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Hej! 

Do reklamy szukam naturszczyków. 

SZUKAMY: 

1. **GŁÓWNY BOHATER KRZYSIEK- wiek 30-35 lat - bardzo zależy nam na panu z brzuszkiem.**
2. **GŁÓWNA BOHATERKA EWA - wiek 45-50 lat - kobieta z klasą, dama **
3. **GŁÓWNY BOHATER TOMEK -  wiek35-40 lat - wiarygodny w roli managera **
4. **GŁÓWNY BOHATER PAN STANISŁAW - starszy pan w wieku 70-78 lat **
5. **GŁÓWNY BOHATER ANIA - wiek 25-30 lat - mile widziany artystyczny look np. Kolorowe włosy, szalona fryzura, kolczyki i tatuaże **
6. **EPIZOD ŻONA W CIĄŻY - wiek 20-35 lat - kobieta w zaawansowanej, widocznej ciąży **
7. **EPIZOD PIANIASTKA - Pani realnie musi być pianistką - bardzo zależy nam na paniach o różnym pochodzeniu etnicznym- Bardzo zależy nam na kobiecie o pochodzeniu azjatyckim !!!**
8. **EPIZOD PRZYJACIÓŁKA - 45-50 lat może być Pani troszkę przy kości**
9. **EPIZOD ZIĘĆ - pan w wieku 30-35 lat **
10. **MAŁY EPIZOD  PRACOWNICY BIURA - pracownicy w wieku 25- 40 lat **

**TERMINY: **

**16.07 - termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godziny 18.00 **

20-24.07 / 27.07.2026 (TBC - finalnie 1 dzień) - recall  w Warszawie- czyli ostataczeny etap castingu 

30-31.07.2026 (1 dzień dla aktora) - przymiarki w Warszawie (powyżej 3 h) 

2/3/4/5/6/7.08.2026 (Ilość dni dla aktora TBC) - ZDJĘCIA (W Warszawie i okolice)

PRAWA wyślę indywidualnie

1500zł dzień zdjęciowy 

Stawki za prawa od 1500 zł - 6000 zł w zależności od roli 

Zgłoszenia przyjmuje pod mailem: 

[Slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:Slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com) 

W zgłoszeniu proszę napisać 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Wzrost 
4. Numer telefonu 
5. Do której roli się zgłaszasz 

 • 6. 2-3 aktualne zdjęcia

items.text:
**CASTING CALL | Social-Media-Clip | Stuttgart | 19.07.2026**

Für die Produktion eines **Social-Media-Clips für eine aufstrebende Streetwear-Marke** suchen wir noch drei Darstellerfür einen Drehtag in **Stuttgart**.

**Gesucht werden**

**Arzt**
* männlich
* ca. 50–70 Jahre

**Empfangsmitarbeiterin**
* weiblich
* ca. 30–50 Jahre

**Patient / Patientin im Wartezimmer**
* ca. 50–80 Jahre
* gerne mit markantem oder besonderem Look
* ein eigener Hund ist ein Plus, aber kein Muss

**Dreh:** 19.07.2026
**Ort:** Stuttgart
**Drehdauer:** je nach Rolle ca. 1–3 Stunden
**Vergütung:** Gage, individuell je nach Rolle

Schauspielerische Erfahrung ist von Vorteil, aber keine Voraussetzung. Uns sind vor allem authentische Persönlichkeiten mit einer natürlichen Ausstrahlung wichtig.

Bei Interesse schickt uns bitte eine E-Mail an **[sven@versusarchive.com](mailto:sven@versusarchive.com)** mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Alter
* Wohnort
* ggf. kurzer Vita oder schauspielerischer Erfahrung

Falls ihr euch in den genannten Rollen nicht wiederfindet, aber trotzdem Lust habt, Teil des Projekts zu sein, schreibt uns gerne trotzdem. Wir sind auf der Suche nach interessanten Gesichtern und authentischen Persönlichkeiten für eine Szene im Wartezimmer.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and eyeglasses

items.text:
Vi søger 2 ensemblemedlemmer til FORVOKSET (ULØNNET)
På grund af et afbud søger vi 2 personer, der har lyst til at blive en del af forestillingen FORVOKSET.

📅 Periode: Juli – 18. august (ikke alle dage – skriv for prøveplan).

📍 Prøver: Hillerød og Gilleleje.

🎭 Spillesteder: Aveny-T, Remisen og Elværket.

Vi søger dig, der: 

• Har mulighed for at deltage i prøve- og spilleperioden.

• Har lyst til at indgå i et tæt og ambitiøst ensemble. 

• Er engageret, nysgerrig og klar på en intensiv og kreativ proces.

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig – alle er velkomne!

Om forestillingen:

Forvokset handler om den fortid og de traumer, der fortsat vokser i os som voksne. Forestillingen er en fortolkning og videreudvikling af udvalgte digte fra digtsamlingen Skyggesider af Janus Hald.

(Læs mere på facebooksiden  Oh no shiit eller instagram @oh.no.shit.insta )

Kan du træde til med kort varsel – eller kender du én, der kunne være interesseret? Så skriv til os hurtigst muligt.

Vi bliver meget glade, hvis du vil dele opslaget i dit netværk😊

Skriv til os på mail: oh.no.shit.kontakt@gmail.com

topComments.text: Hej Malou Holm - måske mig? Sendt dig pb ihvertfald 💫💫💫

items.text: SUBMIT TODAY!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 THE SPOTLIGHT IS BACK ON NYC! 🎬
The screen is descending and the red carpet is being rolled out in the heart of the city. Get ready—the 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is officially taking over New York City this October!
We are looking for the most bold, original, and boundary-pushing voices in cinema. Is your masterpiece ready for the big screen?

✨ CALL FOR SUBMISSIONS ✨
 REGULAR DEADLINE ENDS JULY 24

 🎬 Feature Films & Short Films
 🎥 Documentaries
 ✍️ Screenplays
 🤖 AI-Generated Works
 🎨 Animation
 🧸 Children’s Films
 
  FILMFREEWAY  #filmfestival #indiefilm #films #amttheater #art

items.title: SUBMIT TODAY!

items.text:
🎭 PERFORMING OPPORTUNITY – CASTING FOR 2026 🎭
✨ MPP Character Entertainment is now casting performers for 2026! ✨

We have an exciting year ahead filled with magical parties, immersive events and fairytale experiences! We are looking for talented performers to join our growing team!

📍 Location: Manchester & North West, UK

⸻

🌟 About the Role:

• Most events are based in Manchester and across the North West, so local performers are strongly preferred

• 🚗 A full driving licence and access to a car is required (petrol costs covered)

• 👑 Casting for a range of characters, you may be suited to multiple roles

• 🎭 A background in musical theatre, acting or performance is ideal

• 💖 We’re looking for performers who are bubbly, kind, reliable and confident working with children

We offer flexible opportunities including temporary work, short-term contracts, weekly bookings, and cover shifts, perfect whether you want regular work or occasional gigs ✨

⸻

📩 How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a recent headshot to:

📧Manager@MPPCharacterEntertainment.com

Or drop us a private message to register your interest 💌

🌐 Website: www.manchesterprincessparties.co.uk

We can’t wait to welcome new performers and create even more magical moments in 2026! ✨

MPP Character Entertainment

items.title: 🎭 PERFORMING OPPORTUNITY – CASTING FOR 2026 🎭

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

TENTH MAN FILMS is seeking to film an Independent Feature Film – Funding Teaser Trailer.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17"

An ambitious independent feature film is seeking an exceptional lead actress for a professionally produced teaser trailer to support feature film financing.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17" is a contained horror thriller with political suspense, blending the claustrophobic tension of "Buried" with the global stakes of "Contagion" and the relentless urgency of "24".

When a catastrophic zombie outbreak traps an international diplomat inside Room 17 of a failing hotel, she must stop the world descending into nuclear war using nothing but her intelligence, determination and a rapidly dying mobile phone—all without ever leaving the room.

The Role
This is a performance-led role for an actress capable of carrying the screen almost entirely through visual storytelling.
The teaser contains no dialogue, requiring subtle, truthful and emotionally engaging performance through expression, physicality and screen presence alone. The character is intelligent, composed and resourceful, but as events unfold she is pushed to her emotional and physical limits.

This is an exciting opportunity to become the face of a feature film currently entering the finance stage, with the intention of attaching cast and moving into full production following successful funding.

Casting Brief:
Female
Playing age: 35–55
Professional actress or experienced model with excellent on-camera presence.
Able to convey complex emotion without dialogue.
Strong dramatic ability and confident carrying scenes alone.
Previous film or television experience welcomed but not essential.

Shoot Details
Location: North West England
Shoot: One weekday afternoon/evening during July or August
Duration: Approximately 4–6 hours
Fee: £120

To Apply
Please submit:

Headshot.
Spotlight or Backstage profile.
Showreel (if available).
Current location (Cheshire based talent preferred, as there is no travel budget).
Weekday availability during July and August 2026 (TBC upon availability of cast actress/model).

Shortlisted applicants may be invited to attend an informal Zoom meeting before casting.

To contact, email MJB at tenthmanfilms@outlook.com

items.title: CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

items.text:
Evalution Media and SwanWing Productions are teaming up to bring you a triple-bill of short plays - including the adaptation of Eva Marie Wilshere 's multi-award winning short film, The Year Dot 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Each play is a one-hander (with the exception of the carer at the end of The Year Dot, the longest of the three plays)

We're looking to cast the perfect actress for both Dot and Brenda, paying equity rates of at least £133 for each of the two performances in Nov/early Dec.

**[Saskia Wesnigk-Wood](https://www.linkedin.com/in/saskia-wesnigk-wood-b75a48222/)** of SwanWing Productions will also be auditioning for a male identifying actor for one of her two short plays.
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
All auditions are on Sunday 19th July 2-4pm - please contact us to see the script excerpts in advance **[info@evalutionmedia.com](mailto:info@evalutionmedia.com)**

items.text:
K.A Global© is casting for two original productions currently in development:
Theatre Production (2026)

Television Drama Series (2027)

Successful applicants will be considered for one of the two productions, depending on casting suitability.

About the Projects |

Inspired by real events, these productions blend Drama, Thriller and Suspense, spanning from the 1980s to the present day. The storytelling explores authentic British urban life, relationships, family, identity and society.

Creative references include:

Late Bloomers, Mo, Daytimers, Baps, Ramy, Snatch, Bend It Like Beckham etc.

Due to the confidential nature of the productions, further information including scripts and character breakdowns will only be shared with shortlisted applicants.

Who We're Looking For?

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: British White/Caucasian

Ages: 20's–40's

Character Type: Modern "City Girl" women

Location: Must be based in London, UK

New and emerging talent are encouraged to apply. Character development and rehearsals will be provided throughout the production process.

Compensation:

These are start-up productions currently in development. Funding will commence once production partnerships are finalised.

Following the successful pilot stage play and outstanding audience feedback, the project is progressing towards larger-scale production. Discussions and development opportunities include interest from major broadcasters and streaming platforms.

How to Apply?

DM or Email: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

Please Include:

. Headshot

. Full Name

. Phone Number

. Acting Portfolio, CV, Showreel or Spotlight/credentials (if available)

Audition self-tapes will be requested during the next stage of the casting process. Full audition guidance will be provided to shortlisted applicants.

- Casting Process

- Submit your application.

- Shortlisted applicants will receive an invitation to a casting interview.

- Audition self-tape request.

- Character discussions and project briefing.

- Final casting decisions

Availability:

Applicants should have reasonable flexibility throughout rehearsals and filming. You will not be required every day, but availability for scheduled rehearsals and production dates is essential.

Rehearsals & Training

Professional character development workshops

Experienced acting coaches

Industry agents scouting emerging talent

Rehearsals based at our Camden, London hub

Refreshments and facilities provided

Full rehearsal schedules shared well in advance

We are seeking committed, reliable and professional applicants who are genuinely interested in being part of a long-term creative production. If this sounds like someone you know, feel free to share this casting opportunity.

K.A Global Links |

Homepage: https://kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com/2025/04/kaglobalhomepage.html

Find Us On Google: https://share.google/ZqvIkPd0N8sKIyH6A

Instagram Handle: https://www.instagram.com/kaglobalofficial?utm_source=ig_web_button_share_sheet&igsh=MWdsOGV0Z2Y3YW1maw==

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/KAGlobalCastings

StarNow: https://www.starnow.com/u/kaglobalcastings/?fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAafd7Y7z-wckZIW-Z6fLaGazvaEDNzEaLMCVc4KSOKIa4Hj3PI2RYaKUkwDoQA_aem_G413CMx_Wvhhgj4Sob6jSA

YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@K.AGlobalOfficial

Film/Media Introduction: https://youtu.be/dUjXsb9YTnI?si=idX9AmSK0yryvhIY

Talent Advert: https://youtu.be/ly-bZMUUQLk?si=Dk1PoQYo9eUJlTyw

Testimonials: https://youtu.be/QdEzUsT1P00?si=SdNB-yA_go7zmRvq

sharedPost.text:
ගුහාවට වඩා අඳුරු සිත දකින, අපට වඩා ගැඹුරු 
සිනමා අත්දැකීම - දරී
####################################

සටහනට පෙර සටහන :-
අපේ ජ්‍යෙෂ්ඨ ම අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයෙක් වන බර්ට්‍රම් නිහාල් මහතාගේ ආරාධනයෙන් පහුගිය දා ඔහුගෙ පළමු සිනමා නිර්මාණය "දරී" විශේෂ දර්ශනය නරඹන්නට ලැබුණා.
ඒ වගෙ වෙනස් දෙයක් අත්දැක්කහ ම විතරක් මූණු පොතේ සටහනක් දාන එක මගේ ප්‍රකාශනයෙ එක විදිහක්.
ඒත්, වෙනස් වැඩක් වන මේකට යමක් ලියන එක නං ටිකක් භයානක වැඩක් කියල හිතුණ නිසා දවස් කිහිපයක් කල් ගත්තෙ.
පොදු ප්‍රේකෂාගාරයට නිදහස් වෙන්ඩ කළින් යමක් මේ ගැන ලියන එක ටිකක් පරිස්සමිනුත් කළ යුතු වෙනවා. අනික, බර්ට්‍රම් වගේ විෂය ප්‍රාමාණිකයෙක්ගෙ වැඩක් ගැන ලියද්දි ඒක ටිකක් අධ්‍යයනය කරල ම ලියන්ඩ අවශ්‍යයි.
ඒ්අනුව; ටිකක් විමසල බලපු දේ මෙහෙම එකතු කරන්නං.
 පළමුවෙන් ම මෙය රටේ කවුරුත් බැලිය යුතු චිත්‍රපටයක් කියල ආරාධනා කරන ගමන්, එය බලන්නට ඕන ඇයි, කියල යමක් පැහැදිලි කරන එක මෙතන දි විචාරයකට වඩා උඩින් තියනව කියල කළින් ම කිව යුතුයි. එමතු නොවෙයි, තවමත් පොදු ප්‍රේක්ෂාගාරයට නිදහස් නොවූ නිර්මාණයක් නිසා මට මෙහි කතාව හෙළිදරව්  නොවෙන විදිහට අදහස් දැක්වීමේ සීමාවෙත්  හිරවෙන්නට වෙනව.

ආකෘතිය ඇතුළෙන් ම 
අන්තර්ගතය හමුවන  දරී
####################

මෙය මනෝවිද්‍යාත්මක අපරාධ ගවේෂණ(Psychological  Crime Mistery) ගණයට අයත් වන බව දැනටමත් කියැවී තිබෙනවා. ඒ අතර මට වඩාත් දැනේනෙ මේක Quantum Mechanical Concept එ⁣ක නිසා. මේක ලිහාගෙන ම අපේ කතාවට යන එක හොඳයි කියල හිතෙන හින්දා මෙහෙම කියමු.
පදාර්ථයේ ද්විප්‍රකාරත්වය කියල එකක් අපි අහල තියනවා. ඒක හරියට අර කාසියක් කැරකුවහම නවතිනකං, නෝන ද පොල්ල ද(Head or Tail)  අපිට කියන්ඩ බැහැ වගේ එකක්.
මේක මුළුමනින් ම ඒ සංකල්පය පෙරටුගාමී සිනමාවක(Avant-garde Cinema)  ආලෝකය ලංකාවට විහිදුවමින් අත්හදා බලපු නිර්මාණයක් කියල පේනවා.
ඒක හරියටම ඔප්පු වෙන්නෙ රේඛීය නොවන ආඛ්‍යානයක(Non-linear narrative) පිහිටුවා කිසිඳු බයක් නැතිව අර කාසිය කරකවනව වගේ මේක කරකවපු එඩිතරකම හා එක්තරා විදිහක හිතුවක්කාරකම නිසා කියල කියන්ඩ පුළුවං. මොක ද, මේ වැඩේ මුලුමනින් ම පාහේ මනෝ විද්‍යාත්මක පඨිතයක(text) යන නිසා රේඛීය ආඛ්‍යානය(Linear narrative) මෙයට සුදුසු නොවෙන්නට ඉඩ තිබුණා.  
සිතක තිබෙන ගූඪ බව සහ එය හැසිරෙන විදිහ "දූරඞ්ගමං එකචරං - අසරීරං ගුහාසයං 
යෙ චිත්තං..." ලෙස ධම්ම පදයේ චිත්තත වග්ගයේ සඳහන් වෙනව. මොහොතකින් අතීයටත් අනාගතයටත් යා හැකි එම චිත්ත ස්වභාවය මොනවට ස්ඵුට කරන ආකෘතිය තෝරාගැනීම ම  අභියෝගයකට වඩා අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයාගේ සාර්ථක තීරණයක් බව කිව යුතුයි.
අනෙක, මේ නිර්මාණයෙ ආකෘතිය අන්තර්ගතය අභිබවා යද්දි ඒක ආපහු අන්තර්ගතයට එබෙන විදිහට කරකවන එකත් මට පොඩි රහ වැඩක් විදිහට දැනුණා. තිර පිටපතෙන් බෞද්ධ දර්ශනය ටිකක් ගැඹුරින් විග්‍රහ වෙද්දි ඒක රූප කාර්යයට ඈඳාගන්නෙ කොහොම ද කියන එකයි ලොකු ම අභියෝගය. ඒක ජයගන්නට කැමරා අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයා(මලින්ද සම්පත්)  සහ පසුව සංස්කාරකවරයා(රවීන්ද්‍ර ගුරුගේ) නිර්මාණකරුවා සමඟ බද්ධ ව අතිශය වෙහෙස වී තිබෙන බවත් පැහැදිලියි. ඒ පෙර නොවූ විරූ (අපූර්ව) සමහර උත්සාහයන්ගෙන් සමන්විත වූ එකක්.   

මෙහි ආකෘතිය විසින් ම චරිත වල ප්‍රගමනයට කරනු ලබන වෙනස ගැන ටිකක් වෙන ම හිතන්ඩ පොළඹනවන සුලුයි.
 ඒය ඒකාකාරී වගේ ( Flat Arc) වගේ පෙනුණට යම් සෘණාත්මක ගතියකුත් ගේනවා(Negative-tragic Arc). හේතුව නම්, චෛතසිකයන්ගෙ ස්වභාවය ම එය වීමයි. ඒ අනුව මේ කාර්යය නිකං උඩිං බලල තේරුංගන්ඩ පුළුවං එකක් නෙවෙයි. විශේෂයෙන් ම ප්‍රධාන චරිතය තිලකසිරිගේ කම්පනය(trauma) සහ ඒ පසුපස වූ අනපේක්ෂිත දරුණු ක්‍රියාවකින් ඇති වූ පශ්චාත්තාපය මුසු වරදකාරී බව(guilt) ගේන විදිහ විශේෂයි. ඒ මඟින් බෞද්ධ දාර්ශනික සංකල්ප වල සාරය මුසු වූ  සසර බියකරු බව රූප කාව්‍යයකට ගළපන උත්සාහය ලේසි පාසු වැඩක් නෙවෙයි.
මේකෙ අන්තර්ගතය(Content) පවුලක් ඇතුළෙ ගැටුමකට ගොනු කරල ඊඩිපස් සංකීර්ණයෙ හැඩයෙන් නිමැවෙද්දි, සංදර්භය(Context) ඒකෙ ම විවිධ පරිමාණ චරිත වල චිත්තාවේගයන්
(emotions) මඟින් රූපයට ගේන විදිහ තවත් බැරෑරුම් කටයුත්තක්. ඒ කටයුත්තෙ හැම විනාඩි කිහිපයක් ම පාසා මතුවෙන්නෙ මෙකී ආඛ්‍යානයෙ යට  ස්ථරය හෙවත් යටි පෙළ(Sub text). ඒක තමයි අපිව ටිකක් ගැඹුරට හිතන්ඩ පොළඹවමින් අල්ලාගෙන තබන්නේ.

Cinematography - සංදර්භයට සහ 
ආකෘතියට සැළකීම
#########################

  මුල් කාලයේ ම Alfred Hitchcock ගේ  Vertigo සහ පසු කාළීන Tarantino ගේ Pulp fiction වැනි චිත්‍රපට වල භාවිත කළ Tug of war ශෛලියට යම් විදිහකට ළං වන  ක්‍රමයක කැමරා භාවිතයෙන් (Dolly zoom නැතත්) මෙම සිනමා නිර්මාණයේ තේමාවෙහි ඇති මනෝ භ්‍රාන්තිකභාවය (සමහර විට අති සමීප රූප හෙවත් Extreme Clos-up දක්වා ගොස්) හෙළිකරන්නට සමත් වී තිබෙනවා. එය සවිඥානිකව කළ දෙයක්. 
විශේෂයෙන් මෙහි කේන්ද්‍රය අපරාධයක් ලෙස පෙනුණත් එය සත්‍යයෙන් ම විඥානය තුළ ඇති වරදකාරී හැඟීම (guilty feel) පාදක වූ එකක්. ඒ නිසා මෙම කැමරා භාවිතයත්, ආලෝකය යොදාගැනීමේ විශේෂත්වයත්  තර්කානුකූළ ව  ගැළපෙන බව දැනෙනවා. මන් ද යත්; Claustrophobic trauma හෙවත් විවෘත අවකාශයට ඇති බය මඟින් මනසින් අභ්‍යන්තරගත වීම උපක්‍රමශීලීව රූපකයක් (Metaphor) ලෙස ගුහා(දරී) පරිශ්‍රයකට ගෙන ඒම තවත් එක්තරා අභියෝගයක්. ඒ අනුව ගුහාව අවබෝධයෙන් ම ඉතා අඳුරු කිරීමත් හිතල කරපු වැඩක්. එහි දී ගුහාවෙන් පිටත, ගුහාව තුළ සහ පසුපස යනාදිය නිරීක්ෂණය කළොත් අපට ආලෝකයේ සියුම් වෙනස්කම් හොඳින් දැකගත හැකි වෙනවා. ඒකට ආලෝක ධාරාවන් නියම අනුපාතයට පතිත කරන්නට ගත් උත්සාහය අපට පෙනෙනවා. ඒ අපි Lighting ratio මැනල බලපු හින්ද  නෙවෙයි, ඇහැට දැනෙන හින්දා. විශේෂයෙන් රාත්‍රීයේ ලාම්පු ආලෝකය මෙන් ම එවෙලේ ම  සඳ එළියත් වෙන වෙන ම සූක්ෂම ව ගෙනෙන්නට කැමරා අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයා(ආලෝකකරණ ශිල්පියාත් ලෙස)ගත් උත්සාහයන් ද වටිනවා. මවගේ චිත්තාභ්‍යන්තර ඝට්ඨනය පෙන්වීමෙදි යට කී ලෙස එයට සමබර නොවූ අනුපාතයකින් සිද්ධ වූයේ නම් ඇය ව  එතරම් අපට නොදැනේවි යන්න මගේ හැඟීමයි. ඒක එහෙම කියන්නෙ මෙහි තිබෙන සංදර්භය විසින් ඉල්ලන ලද මෙන් ම ආකෘතියට සේවය කරන Clustrophobic framing වලට යොමුවෙන්නට මලින්ද වෙහෙස දරා ඇති බවත් දැනෙන නිසායි. ඒකෙ දි කැමරාව තබන උස පවා හිතල තියන බව පැහැදිලියි(Pedestal  height) ඒ වගේ ම නාභි දුර ලෙස අප හඳුනාගනන්නා  focal lengths ගැන පැහැදිලි අදහසකින් රූගත වී තිබෙන බව රූප ගැන්මේ අත්දැකීම් ඇති අයෙකුට හොඳින් පේනවා.

අභියෝග රැසක් ජයගත් 
පර්යේෂණාත්මක සංස්කරණයක්
#########################

Non-linear Editing මෙරට සිනමාවට ගෙනාපු පුරෝගාමියා රවීන්ද්‍ර ගුරුගේ කරපු සංස්කරණයක් ගැන අදහසක් දෙන්නට යනව කියන්නෙ, ලියැවිල්ල කරන මටත් චිත්‍රපටියෙ ආතතිය ම එන වැඩක්. ඒ්ත් අප අධ්‍යයනය කරනු ලබන කලාපයක ⁣ජ්‍යේෂ්ඨයෙක්ගෙ කටයුත්තක් ගැන විමසීමට ගන්න එක ම අපට වටින දෙයක්. ඒ නිසා ම අඩුවක් නොතියා, යමක් ඒ් ගැනත් ලියන්නං.
"දරී"  වැනි විඛණ්ඩනය වූ කථාවස්තු(Fragmented narrative) ඉදිරිපත් කිරීමක් සංස්කරණය කරද්දී  ඒක ලොකු අභියෝගයක් වෙනවා. ඒමන්ද යත්,  මේ කැබලි කර විහිදුවන  කථාව ප්‍රේක්ෂකයා නැවත ගොඩනඟාගත යුතු (Reconstruct the story) විදිහට සංස්කරණය සිදු කරන්නට වීම. දර්ශනයන් එකතු කරන තාක්ෂණික ක්‍රියාවලියකින් එහා බෞද්ධ දර්ශනය සහ මනෝ විද්‍යාත්මක අර්ථය ගේන්නට මෙහි සංස්කරණය සමත් වෙලා තියනව කියල මට හිතනෙව.
සමහර විට නැවත නැවත සිදුවන රූප, සිදුවීම් සහ සංක්‍රමණ මඟින් සංසාර චක්‍රයේ පුනරාවර්තන ස්වභාවය සංකේතවත් කරනවා.(Cyclical editing patterns මඟින්).
බෞද්ධ සංකල්ප වල කවුරුත් දන්නා කර්මය, සංසාර ස්වභාවය වගේ සංකල්ප රූප ඇමිණුමට ගේන ගමන් සිතිවිලි වල අපිළිවෙල සහ වේගය(pacing) ගැන හිතන්ඩ වෙන්නෙ චිත්තාවේග වල රිද්මය පවත්වාගන්නා ගමන්මයි. ඒක තවත් අභියෝගයක්. 
(Controlling Emotional Rhythm)
මගේ දැනුමේ හැටියට ඒක මෙහි හොඳින් ජයගත් අභියෝගයක්. කථානායකයා කර්මයට කොටුවෙන විදිහත් එයින් මිදීමට නොහැකිව හිරවෙන ආකාරයත් කැමරාවෙන් හොයල දෙනකොට, සංස්කරණයෙන් ඒකට උචිත  රිද්මය පවත්වාගෙන යාම හරි අපූරු  වැඩක්. කර්මයේ ප්‍රතිරාව ශබ්ද වලට ගෙන ආපු මෙහි සංගීත අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයාට සංස්කරණයෙන් දී තිබෙන සහයෝගය ලඝු කරන්නට බැහැ. පරිසරයේ ස්වභාවික ශබ්ද(ambient sounds) පවා අවශ්‍ය තැනට ගේන විදිහත් සංස්කරණයෙ දි සළකා බලල තිබෙනවා. 
මෙහි සංගීතයෙ දි  මුල් විනාඩි 30ටත් වඩා ක්‍රමයෙන් තීව්‍ර කරන විදිහ උක්ත සාකච්ඡා කළ මනෝ භ්‍රාන්තිය හා ගූඪ බව විදහා පානවා. එය බර්ට්‍රම්ගේ දාර්ශනික සිනමා පිවිසුම සහ බර්ග්මාන් වර්ගයේ මනෝ විද්‍යාත්මක අත්හදාබැලීමකට තල්ලුවක්.

කතාවකට වඩා අර්ථය ගේන, 
සිතන්නට බල කරන දරී.
#####################

මෙය නැරඹීමට වඩා කියවිය යුතු චිත්‍රපටයක් වන්නේ, උක්ත කී කරුණු නිසා ම පමණක් නෙවෙයි. මෙහි සංසාරය උපමේය කරගෙන ගේන ගඟ වගේ ම පංචායුධයේ සංකේත භාවිතය අපව වෙන ම බෞද්ධ චාරිකාවක් ගෙන යන දාර්ශනික බර නිසා. ආකෘතියෙන් ම හිර නොකර විවෘත ව්‍යුහයක තියමින් පශ්චාත් නූතනවාදී(Post modern) ගතියක් මේකට ගේන ගමන් කර්මයේ අභ්‍යන්තර විනිශ්චය විග්‍රහ කරල විචාරාත්මක චින්තනයට අභියෝගත් කරනවා වගේ කියල මට හිතෙනවා. අවසානයෙ ප්‍රේක්ෂකයට ඕන උත්තරේ නොදෙන, අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයාගෙ පරිකල්පනයෙන් අපට වෙනස් විදිහකට හිතන්නට යෝජනා කරන නිර්මාණයක්.
වෙලාවකට, මේවයෙ පැටළිලා ප්‍රේක්ෂකය අතරමං වෙයි ද කියල පුංචි බයකුත් හිතෙනවා. ඒ නිසාමයි මා යෝජනා කරන්නේ, මේක බලනවට වඩා අපට කියවන්ඩ වෙන වග.
සාමාන්‍ය ප්‍රේක්ෂකයා show එකක් බලන්නට යනව වෙනුවට, හිතන්නට යමක් අරගෙන එන්නට සහ කළිනුත් බෞද්ධ දර්ශනය සහ මනෝ විද්‍යාව ගැන යම් පුංචි ප්‍රමාණයක හරි දැනගෙන සිනමා ශලාවෙ ඉඳගන්ඩ වෙනවා. එහෙම නොවුණ අයට බලන්ඩ යම් කතාවක් සහිත picture එකක් තියනව තමයි, ඒත්; ඒක ටිකක් වෙනස් අත්දැකීමක්. 

රංගන ශිල්පීන්ට වැඩමුළුවක් වූ දරී-Acting
################################

Anthony Hopkins, කියල තියනව
"Acting is not intellectual. It is emotional. It is feeling" (රංගනය බුද්ධියෙන් නොව, හැඟීමෙන් සිදුවෙන කලාවක්)කියල. හැබැයි, ඒක විවාදාපන්නයි. කළින් ම බුද්ධියටත් යම් යම් කොටස් තියනවා. මං හිතන්නේ
බර්ට්‍රම් නිහාලුත්  කළින් ඒ  interlectual කොටස තිර පිටපතෙන් ම කළා කියල සහ නළුවන්ටත් එය දුන්නා කියල. රංගනයෙදි ඒක අවබෝධ කරගෙන, පැත්තක තියල emotional journy එක යන්ඩ නළුවා තමන්ට ඉඩ දෙන්ඩයි ඕන කියල විතරක් දැනට කියන්නං.
මෙහි ප්‍රධාන චරිත වල screen acting  ගැන ඉතා කෙටි සටහනක් තියන්නං, වැඩේ ජනගත වුණහ ම ඒ සංවාදෙට ඉඩ ඉතිරි කරලා.

මව(වීණා ජයකොඩි) :- 
මේ චරිතය හරිහමං පළපුරුද්දක් නැති  ශිල්පිනියකට ජයගන්ඩ පුළුවං අභියෝගයක් නං නෙමෙයි. චිත්තාවේග පැටවිලා (Emotionally loaded) අතිශය බර වුණ හදවතක ඒ බර මුහුණෙන් සහ ශරීරයෙන් පේන්ඩ හරින එක ලේසිපාසු වැඩක් ද? 
අනික, මේක හැඟීම කාන්දු වීමක්(Emotional leackage). ඒක වාං  දොරටුවක් කළා නං වැඩේ අහවර වෙනව. තවත් ගැඹුරට ගියොත්, වීණාට මේ කරන්නට වෙලා තියෙන්නෙ ප්‍රේක්ෂක අපි කාටත් චිත්‍රපටයේ පේන, ස්පර්ශ කළ හැකි තරං ඉතා පැහැදිලි ආතතියක(චිත්‍රපට රංගනයෙදි කතා කරන Palpable tension) නිරූපණයක්.
එය මේ වැඩේ ජනගත වුණහම කාටත් පැහැදිලිව දැනෙයි. ඒ මන්ද යත්; මේක සිනමාත්මක ගැඹුර හොඳින් තියන චරිත ඉදිරිපත්කිරිමක් (Cinematic Depth).

පියා(සෞම්‍ය ලියනගේ) :- 
මේක පැහැදිලිව ම අභ්‍යන්තර හැඟීම් යථාර්ථවාදී ව පෙනෙන්නට සැළැස්විය යුතු විදිහට ලියපු චරිතයක් (Internal emotional realism) විදිහටයි දිවෙන්නේ. ඔහු මානසික ව  උගුළක හිරවෙලා. ඒක එක විදිහකට මහ අපායක්(Trapped in a psychological hell)වගේ. චරිතය ස්වභාවික වේවා, එසේ නොවේවා, එයට අනන්‍ය වූ අභ්‍යන්තර බලය තිබිය යුතුයි. ඒකට යම් හොඳ උත්සාහයක් මේ ශිල්පියාගේ තියනවා, ඒ්ත් ඒක එහෙම ම පේන්ඩ තිබ්බ ද කියන ප්‍රශ්නය මට එනවා.(Screen Acting වල සාකච්ඡා වෙන "missing internal power" කියන අදහස).
පසුවට මේ සාකච්ඡාව ඉතිරි කරමු. සිනමා රංගයෙදි කියැවෙන "Interlectualizing a role & internalizing a role" (බුද්ධිමය වශයෙන් තේරුම්ගැනීම සහ ඇතුළෙන් එයම වීම, වගේ) කියන අදහස විවෘත ව තියල එය දැනට අවසන් කරමු. මොක ද, ඒක Method Acting and Ontological Aproach to Acting කියන දෙක එක්ක ටිකක් ලිහන්ඩ වෙන වැඩක් නිසා.

තිලකසිරි (නිශාන්ත කුළරත්න) :- 
අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයාට කියන්ඩ ඕන දේත් කියන්නට ඕන විදිහත් ප්‍රක්ෂේපණයට වැඩියෙන්ම යොදාගන්නෙ තිලකසිරිව. එතන දි තිලකසිරිට වඩා නිශාන්ත ඒ උගුළෙ හිර වුණා ද කියලත් හිතෙන වෙලාවල් මට ආවා. සිනමාවෙ අත්දැකීම් ලොකුවට නැති ඔහු දරපු උත්සාහය නං අගය කළ යතුයි. එමෙන් ම බර්ට්‍රම් මේ තරං බර වැඩි, මනෝමය දිරාපත්වීමක්, මළ බැඳීමක්
(psychological corrosion)  සහිත චරිතයක් අලුත් කෙනෙක් එක්ක අත්හදාබැලීම ම එක්තරා විදිහක ලොකු අවදානමක්  වගේ ම එඩිතරකමක්. ඒ චරිතය තුළ දිවෙන දිගු කාළීන ආතතිය (Chronic stress) අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයා තුළ රූගත කළ පරිශ්‍රයෙ දි කොහොම තියෙන්ඩැද්ද, කියල එතකොට මට හිතනෙවා. ඒත් නිශාන්ත සමහර දේ යම් තරමකට ජයගන්නවා කියල අපිට දැනෙනවා, ඒත් තිලකසිරිට ඒක තදින් දැනුණ ද? කියන ප්‍රශ්නය නැවත වටයකින් මට එනවා. යට කී corrosion එක ඔහුගෙ තිබුණ ද කියල හිතෙන ගමං, තිර රංගනයෙ කතාවෙන "Performance stops at the skin" කියන සංකල්පය ගැන අපටත් නිශාන්ටත් නැවත හැරී බලන්ඩ මෙතන දි මගෙන් යෝජනා වෙනව කියල සඳහන් කරන්නම්.

කථනාබාධ සහිත චරිතය ( ප්‍රියංකර රත්නායක) : - 
ඔහුගේ ආබාධය අනුව මූලික භාෂාව වෙන්නෙම බාහිරව පෙන්වීමේ රංගනය. යටි පෙළ (Sub text) ඇතුළට අරගෙන(internalize) 
එළියට ගේන දෙයින්(outward expression ) තිර රංගනයෙ මූලික සම්මතයන් බිඳෙන චරිතයක ඔහු ඉන්නෙ. ශරිරය විතැන්වීම, මුහු⁣ණෙන් පෙන්වීම වගේ දේවල් වලට වැඩි බරක් එහි තියන්ඩ වෙනවා. ඒත්, ඒක එම චරිතයේ තමං විඳින තැං ටිකක් (මේ කතාව අනුව) අඩු නිසා ඔහුගෙ අභ්‍යන්තරය හෙළිවීම අඩු බව පේනවා. ඒ  හැර ප්‍රිංකරගේ කාර්යය එහෙමට ම අඩු ලංසුවක තියන්ඩ බැහැ. චරිතය විසින් ඉල්ලන දේ නිසා සමහර විට ඒ චලනයන් අධික වීම වෙලා තියනවා. ඒක තව අඩු වුණත් හොඳයි කියල හිතෙන තැං නැතුවා නෙවෙයි.

භික්ෂු චරිත :-
පොඩි හාමුදුරුවන් යම් තාත්වික රංගනයකට (realistic) උත්සාහයක් කරන බව පේන ගමන් ලොකුහාමුදුරුවන් යම් ශෛලීගතවීමක්(stylish) බවත් පේනවා. දෙදෙනාගේ ම හැසිරීම් වල අධික සංවරය සහ දෙබස් ඉදිරිපත් කිරීම වෙනුවට තව ටිකක් නිදහස් ආරකට පැමිණියේ නම් හොඳ බව විතරක් දැනට සටහන් කරන්නං. ඒක ගැන ලියන්ඩ බොහෝ දේ තිබෙන නිසා.

නොරට සිනමාව සිහි කරන මෙරට දරී
#############################

මනෝවිද්‍යාත්මක අපරාධ විමර්ශන වර්ගයේ උදාහරණයක් දෙකක්, ජාත්‍යන්තර සිනමාවෙනුත් අරං දරී ගැන හිතන්ඩ පුළුවං කියල මට හිතුණා. මතකෙට ආපු Cache(2005)  ඒ එකක්. එනම්, Michael Haneke අධ්‍යක්ෂණය කළ ප්‍රංශ මනෝවිද්‍යාත්මක චිත්‍රපටය. එය කථානායකයා කුඩා කාලෙදි තවත් කුඩා ළමයෙකුට කළ වරදක් සම්බන්ධයෙන් පෙළෙන කම්පනය සමඟ  දිවෙනවා. චිත්‍රපටයේ කතා පුවත රේඛීය එකක්. එසේ වුව ද, එහි භාවිත කර ඇති සංස්කරණ ශිල්පීය ක්‍රම මඟින් අතීතය, වර්තමානය සහ තවත් නිරීක්ෂණ වීඩියෝ පට අතර සීමාවන් හිතාමතාම පටළවනු ලබනව. ඒක කරන්නේ, බාධාකාරී අරේඛීය සංස්කරණයෙන් (Disruptive, non-linear editing).
එමෙන් ම තවත් මෙවන් ෂානරයකට සමිප චිත්‍රපටයක් විදිහට Martin Scorasese අධ්‍යක්ෂණය කළ Shutter Island(2010) සැළකිය හැකියි. එහි දී යම්  ප්‍රබල හේතුවකට තම බිරිඳ මැරූ කථානායකයා සිටිනා භ්‍රාන්තික මනෝ ව්‍යාධී තත්වය ද රේඛීය නොවන සංස්කරණයකින් ඉදිරිපත් කර තිබෙනවා. එමෙන් ම රූප සංතති පවා බිඳිමින් (Continity jump) එය පෙන්වූ ආකාරය ද සිහි කළ හැකියි.
මෙනයින් බැලුවත්, ජාත්‍යන්තරයට සාපේක්ෂව සංසංදනාත්මකව "දරී" හි පරයේෂණාත්මක පරාසය තව පුළුල් වෙන බව සටහන් කළ හැකියි. මොකද, අපිට ඉන්ග්මාර් බර්ග්මාන් වර්ගයේ දැක්මක හෙවනැළි ඇති අධ්‍යක්ෂවරුන් අඩු නිසා එහෙම සිනමා මඟක් එළිපෙහෙළි කරගන්න එක  වටිනවා.

 අපට වඩා ලොකු "දරී"
################

Martin Scorsese,  සහ Satyajit Ray වගේ අධ්‍යක්ෂවරුන්ගෙ සමහර කතා බහ වල  දි අර්ථ ගැන්වෙනවා,
"Film is bigger than us"
(චිත්‍රපටිය අපට වඩා ලොකුයි) කියල.
ඒක ඒ අයත් තවත් බොහෝ අයත් කියන ටිකක් සංකීර්ණ අර්ථයක මතුපිට ප්‍රකාශයක් කියලයි මට පේන්නෙ. ඒකෙ නළුවෙක්ව, අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයාව, කැමරා ශිල්පියාව හෝ  සංගීතඥයව පේනවට වඩා චිත්‍රපටය තමයි පෙන්ඩ ඕන කියනව වගේ කතාවක් තමයි කියැවෙන්නෙ කියල මට හිතෙනවා. එහෙම යම්කිසි වැඩක් ලොකු වෙන්නෙ අපි කළින් ඒකට ලොකු දේවල් කළොත් තමයි. බොහෝ විද්වතුන්  මේ වෙනකොටත් දරී ගැන කියල තියන දේවල් අනුව අධ්‍යක්ෂවරයා මෙතන ලොකු දේවල් කරල තියනවා. දැං චිත්‍රපටිය අපි දිහා බලන වෙලාව එනව.  බලමු ඒ වෙලාවෙ චිත්‍රපටිය අපට මොනව කියයි ද කියල. සමහර වෙලාවට අපිට වඩා ගොඩක් ලොකු තැනකට චිත්‍රපටිය ගිහිං අපි පුංචි ම වෙන්ඩත් පුළුවං. අපි නොහිතන වෙනස් ම දෙයක් 
වෙන්ඩත් පුළුවං.
හරියට අපි අපේ සියල්ල කැප කරල, සරු දේ උගන්නල අපේ දරුවා ලොකු කළහම දරුවා අපට වඩා උස ම තැනක ඉඳල අපි දිහා බලනව වගේ. එතනදි අපිව දරුවට ගොඩක් පුංචියට පේන්ඩ 
ඉඩ තියනවා.
හැබැයි අපිට අප්‍රමාණ ප්‍රීතියක් තියනව කොහොම බැලුවත්. මොක ද, ඒ අපේ දරුවා. අපි(අම්මා, තාත්තා, මාමා, නැන්දා...) සියල්ලන් ටික කලකදි නැතිවෙයි. දරුවා තව බොහෝ දුර 
යන්ඩ ඕන. 
අපි බලමු ළඟදී ම බර්ට්‍රම් තාත්තා දිහා මේ දරුවා "දරී" බලන්නේ කොහොම ද කියල.
හැමෝ ම නොවරදවා ම ඒක බලන්ඩ යමු.
👇

*ලියැවිල්ලට පසුව ලියැවුණ ටික :- 
චිත්‍රපටිය බැලුවට පස්සෙ, දරී කැමරා අධ්‍යක්ෂ මලින්ද  මිත්‍රයා එක්ක ඇතිවුණ  දිග කතාබහකින් පස්සෙ ඔහු මගෙන් ඇහුවා, 
"සුරංගයියේ, ඔක්කොම පැත්තකින්
 තියල කියන්නකො, බර්ට්‍රම් මහත්තය⁣ගෙ film එකේ finishing එක කොහොම ද කියල?"

මගෙ පිළිතුර : - එයාගෙ වැඩ, පෙනුමෙ, Office එකේ ඉඳල නිර්මාණ දක්වා සියල්ලේ finshing එක ගැන බැලුව ම මේකෙත් finishing ගැන අමුතුවෙන් කියන්ඩ දෙයක් නෑ.

(කාලයක් වැඩ කරමින්,අධ්‍යයනය කරමින් ඉන්න විෂයක ඒවයෙ tools ටිකක් ප්‍රායෝගිකව යොදල, කපල-කොටල,  විමසල බලන්ඩ පුළුවං චිත්‍රපටියක් අපේ අතට ලැබෙන්නෙ කලාතුරකින්. ඉතිං  ඇතුළෙ තියං පුස් බැඳුන ඒ සංකල්ප ටිකක් එළියට ඇදල ගසල බලන්ඩ මහන්සි වෙලා කාලය ගත්තා මිසක මහ විචාරයක් කළා නෙමෙයි. අඩුපාඩුත් ඇති. කොහොම හරි ඒකට පොටක් පෑදුව අපේ හිතාදර බර්ට්‍රම් නිහාල් ජ්‍යෙෂ්ඨයට නොවක් තුති❤️)

 - සුරංග ලක්මාල් සෙනෙවිරත්ත.

sharedPost.text:
American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

  sullivansean3535@gmail.com

Come help us bring Radio Theater to life this Christmas!

MILESTONE ALERT! 🎉 Widow’s Bay was nominated for 19 Emmys, including Outstanding Casting for a Comedy Series. This marks Boston Casting’s VERY FIRST Emmy Nomination, and we couldn’t be prouder that it’s for this remarkable show. If you haven’t seen it yet, the accolades speak for themselves—what are you waiting for? Catch it now on Apple TV!

#widowsbay #apple #appletv #emmys #emmynomination #emmynominations #casting #castingnomination #bostoncasting #bostoncastinginc

items.text: SUBMIT TODAY!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 THE SPOTLIGHT IS BACK ON NYC! 🎬
The screen is descending and the red carpet is being rolled out in the heart of the city. Get ready—the 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is officially taking over New York City this October!
We are looking for the most bold, original, and boundary-pushing voices in cinema. Is your masterpiece ready for the big screen?

✨ CALL FOR SUBMISSIONS ✨
 REGULAR DEADLINE ENDS JULY 24

 🎬 Feature Films & Short Films
 🎥 Documentaries
 ✍️ Screenplays
 🤖 AI-Generated Works
 🎨 Animation
 🧸 Children’s Films
 
  FILMFREEWAY  #filmfestival #indiefilm #films #amttheater #art

items.text:
✨ **Home educating a neurodivergent or SEND child?**

🌱 **We're offering *****Life Skills***** classes designed to support how they learn best, and we have spaces for September! **
**Available for ages 6-12 & 13-16.**

These friendly online group sessions help children and young people to:
🧠 Understand emotions & self-awareness
🗣️ Communicate clearly and confidently
🤝 Build social skills
🌟 Grow independence & self-esteem

We work with lots of neurodivergent learners (including autism, ADHD, PDA, anxiety and more), and our approach is gentle, kind, and adaptable to each child's needs.

***Not sure if online learning will work for your child?*** 🤔 
We have a trial available on our Open Week in August! ☀️ 
*Only £3.60 and no commitment!*

Let me know if you'd like to try it out! 😊
~ Aimee, Swan Tutoring
