sharedPost.text:
💎Dance Diamonds💎  26.09. - 27.09.2026 international dance competition Germany !!!
🔥Die Registration / Anmeldung ist ab sofort bis zum 10.09.26 möglich:
https://www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟Der Tanzwettbewerb richtet sich an Amateur-Tänzerinnen und -Tänzer ab der Alterskategorie 10 Jahre bis zur offenen Altersklasse.
🌟Die Wettbewerbsteilnahme ist in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group,Group und Grand Group möglich.
🌟Der Wettbewerb umfasst eine Vielzahl unterschiedlicher Tanzstile. Darüber hinaus ist er für die Vorbereitung in verschiedenen Stufen für Performer oder Tanzgruppen vorgesehen.
🌟Competition program / Wettbewerbsprogramm:
💢​26.09.2026
Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Fortgeschritten/ Advanced:
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens;
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
All age groups and all dance styles.
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎- Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💢 27.09.2026
​Solo - Duo/Trio - Small Group - Group - Grand Group
Beginners/ Novices
💎Age to 10 - 13 Years/ Alter 10 - 13 Jahre - Young Teens
💎Age to 13 - 17 Years/ Alter 13 - 17 Jahre - Teens
💎Age to 17 - 21 Years/ Alter 17 - 21 Jahre - Young Adults
💎Age to 21 - 27 Years/ Alter 21- 27 Jahre - Adults
💎Offene  Alterskategorie, 27+/ open Age category 27+
💎Mixed Alterskategorie/ Mixed Age category - only Group's
🌟All age groups and all dance styles.​
💎 - Classical Ballet / Pointe
💎 - Neo Classic/ Contemporary/ Lyrical dance
💎 - Nationaltanz, Folklore, Charakter-, Hof-, Historischer Tanz
💎 - Hip Hop / Streetdance / Breakdance / Krump
💎 - Jazz-, Modern Dance/ Jazz Funk
💎 - Show Dance/Musical/ Stage Dance
💎 - Open - Mix Dance Styles​​
💥Registration/ Anmeldung bis 10.09. 2026 möglich / Registration is open until September 10, 2026.
🔥Das Wettbewerb präsentiert über Livestream für alle Interessenten kostenfrei und ohne extra Anmeldung über unsere Online Plattform.
💥Award -  die Bewertung läuft nach Punkten System von hochkarätige Jury.
Die Gewinner der 1 - 2 - 3 erhalten Pokale und Medaillen.
🏆 🥈🥈🥈 🥉🥉🥉 🥇🥇🥇 🏆
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
"Dance Diamonds Kids" 19.12. - 20.12.2026
Die Anmeldung ist vom 01.10.26 bis zum 06.12.26 möglich.
🌟Das Wettbewerb ist speziell für junge Performerinnen und Performer im Alter von 3 bis 12 Jahren organisiert. Die Teilnahme erfolgt in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group und Group.
🌟Zudem werden die Teilnehmer nach ihren Vorbereitungsstufen, sei es für Einzelperformer oder Tanzgruppen, in unterschiedliche Kategorien eingeteilt.
🌟Auf der Webseite www.art-element.de finden Sie detaillierte Informationen über unser Team, unsere Projekte- und Events - Programme sowie Archive.
Für weitere Fragen stehen wir Ihnen gerne telefonisch oder per WhatsApp: 0049-1577- 3131438 zur Verfügung.
💎DANCE DIAMONDS
Stadthalle Kleve, Lohstätte 7 · 47533 Kleve, NRW,Germany
💎DANCE DIAMONDS KIDS💎
Stadthalle Hückelhoven,Rathausplatz 1, 41836 Hückelhoven, NRW, Germany

🌟Das Wettbewerb ist speziell für junge Performerinnen und Performer im Alter von 3 bis 12 Jahren organisiert. Die Teilnahme erfolgt in den Kategorien Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group und Group.
🌟Zudem werden die Teilnehmer nach ihren Vorbereitungsstufen, sei es für Einzelperformer oder Tanzgruppen, in unterschiedliche Kategorien eingeteilt.
🌟Auf der Webseite www.art-element.de finden Sie detaillierte Informationen über unser Team, unsere Projekte- und Events - Programme sowie Archive.
Für weitere Fragen stehen wir Ihnen gerne telefonisch oder per WhatsApp: 0049-1577- 3131438 zur Verfügung.
💎DANCE DIAMONDS
Stadthalle Kleve, Lohstätte 7 · 47533 Kleve, NRW,Germany

Stadthalle Hückelhoven,Rathausplatz 1, 41836 Hückelhoven, NRW, Germany

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

items.text:
Hello all, 

First off, thank you for your overwhelming support and application for “Miss. Lonelyhearts Memory Light” - I made a post on here for our feature a few weeks ago and received way more engagement than I expected. Because of this community, we have been able to track down the perfect cast for our film and my heart is full. Now I only have one major role left to cast -

Delia - Female, Age 35 - 50 - Kids foster Mom. Appears primarily at the beginning and end of the film. In the finale, she is dressed completely in white, representing the "safe place" Kid eventually chooses over her father. Currently scheduled for August 5th and 7th.

If interested, please send an email to rowanharper386@gmail.com and be sure to attach a headshot and a reel if you have it. Note, we are currently working with deferred pay and I’d be happy to discuss that with you.

Additionally, we are looking for 1-3 child extras (Ages 8-12) for our first shoot day, this Wednesday - July 15th. If you have a child who would be interested, or know someone who does, please send me an email and I’d be happy to answer any questions.

Hope to chat soon,
Rowan

topComments.text: Is 15 too old for a child extra?

items.text:
CASTING CALL

TITLE: Waiting on the Sky

GENRE: Drama/Comedy

LOGLINE: Three friends wait for the imminent alien arrival. On a rooftop patio they learn more about each other and uncover what they are really waiting for. 

ROLES:

Keely - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the alien hunter

Janice - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the supportive friend

Gordie - A young man in his 20s/30s, the uninvested doubter

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Denver Community Media. We are Denver’s community media access program and set up productions for students to get hands-on experience.

WRITER/DIRECTOR: Austin Anderson

PRODUCTION TYPE: Student Short Film

CONCTACT: Austin.Anderson@denvergov.org

RUN TIME: ~10 minutes

COMPENSATION: Unpaid

UNION STATUS: Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION: Self Tape or in-person at Denver Community Media

SHOOT DATES: July 16th and 17th from 5pm - 9pm. Must be available for both dates. 

Cheers!

items.text:
CASTING ‼️
Zostań Queen of Poland 2026 

Dziewczyny! 👑
Piękne, odważne, pełne energii to właśnie Was szukamy!

Gorący klimat, ogromne emocje i walka o koronę, a wszystko zobaczysz na antenie Polsatu!
Już niedługo kolejny casting to może być Twoja szansa!

Zgłoś się teraz na:
📩 biuro@maxima-models.pl
Wyślij nam swoje zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki oraz napisz coś o sobie. 

Kto wie? Może to będzie Twój rok?

Na finalistki czekają:

✨ zgrupowanie w wyjątkowej, słonecznej destynacji
✨ występ na antenie Polsatu
✨ możliwość nawiązania współpracy z markami oraz rozpoczęcia kariery w modelingu
✨ profesjonalne sesje zdjęciowe
✨ współpraca z renomowanymi stylistami
✨ rozwój wizerunku, pewności siebie i umiejętności scenicznych
✨ wyjątkowe znajomości i wspomnienia, które pozostaną na lata

Queen of Poland 2026 to przestrzeń dla kobiet, które chcą się rozwijać, inspirować innych i odważnie sięgać po swoje marzenia.

Zaobseruj nas na Instagramie, aby być na bieżąco 👇🏽

https://www.instagram.com/maximamodels?igsh=aXBkaDZucGZuNHpw&utm_source=qr

#casting #queenofpoland #polsat

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – UK, LONDON BASED BRITISH WHITE/CAUCASIAN FEMALE ACTRESSES WANTED
K.A Global© is casting for two original productions currently in development:

Theatre Production (2026)

Television Drama Series (2027)

Successful applicants will be considered for one of the two productions, depending on casting suitability.

About the Projects |

Inspired by real events, these productions blend Drama, Thriller and Suspense, spanning from the 1980s to the present day. The storytelling explores authentic British urban life, relationships, family, identity and society.

Creative references include:

Late Bloomers, Mo, Daytimers, Baps, Ramy, Snatch, Bend It Like Beckham etc.

Due to the confidential nature of the productions, further information including scripts and character breakdowns will only be shared with shortlisted applicants.

Who We're Looking For?

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: British White/Caucasian

Ages: 20's–40's

Character Type: Modern "City Girl" women

Location: Must be based in London, UK

New and emerging talent are encouraged to apply. Character development and rehearsals will be provided throughout the production process.

Compensation:

These are start-up productions currently in development. Funding will commence once production partnerships are finalised.

Following the successful pilot stage play and outstanding audience feedback, the project is progressing towards larger-scale production. Discussions and development opportunities include interest from major broadcasters and streaming platforms.

How to Apply?

DM or Email: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

Please Include:

. Headshot

. Full Name

. Phone Number

. Acting Portfolio, CV, Showreel or Spotlight/credentials (if available)

Audition self-tapes will be requested during the next stage of the casting process. Full audition guidance will be provided to shortlisted applicants.

- Casting Process

- Submit your application.

- Shortlisted applicants will receive an invitation to a casting interview.

- Audition self-tape request.

- Character discussions and project briefing.

- Final casting decisions.

Availability

Applicants should have reasonable flexibility throughout rehearsals and filming. You will not be required every day, but availability for scheduled rehearsals and production dates is essential.

Rehearsals & Training

Professional character development workshops

Experienced acting coaches

Industry agents scouting emerging talent

Rehearsals based at our Camden, London hub

Refreshments and facilities provided

Full rehearsal schedules shared well in advance

We are seeking committed, reliable and professional applicants who are genuinely interested in being part of a long-term creative production. If this sounds like someone you know, feel free to share this casting opportunity.

K.A Global Links |

Homepage: https://kaglobalofficial.blogspot.com/2025/04/kaglobalhomepage.html

Find Us On Google: https://share.google/ZqvIkPd0N8sKIyH6A

Instagram Handle: https://www.instagram.com/kaglobalofficial?utm_source=ig_web_button_share_sheet&igsh=MWdsOGV0Z2Y3YW1maw==

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/KAGlobalCastings

StarNow: https://www.starnow.com/u/kaglobalcastings/?fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAafd7Y7z-wckZIW-Z6fLaGazvaEDNzEaLMCVc4KSOKIa4Hj3PI2RYaKUkwDoQA_aem_G413CMx_Wvhhgj4Sob6jSA

YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@K.AGlobalOfficial

Film/Media Introduction: https://youtu.be/dUjXsb9YTnI?si=idX9AmSK0yryvhIY

Talent Advert: https://youtu.be/ly-bZMUUQLk?si=Dk1PoQYo9eUJlTyw

Testimonials: https://youtu.be/QdEzUsT1P00?si=SdNB-yA_go7zmRvq

items.text:
The Career Shortcut Most Actors Miss 🎭

I once went up for a commercial alongside Olivia Colman. We did the scene reading together. I was going to be Kev.I didn't get it.

That rejection stung — but it taught me something crucial: if nobody in the industry knows who you are, you simply aren't getting cast.

Most actors turn their nose up at commercials. I did too. But here's what you're missing:
📺 James Corden's first TV appearance? An Orange Tango advert. That led to Fat Friends, which led to me casting him in Heroes and Villains — and the rest is history.

🎬 Ross Kemp did a Kellogg's golf advert early on. When he walked into auditions after that, casting directors already knew his face. It broke the ice every single time.

Commercials give you three things every actor needs:

1️⃣ Money — proper pay for a year's work
2️⃣ Industry recognition — casting directors remember faces
3️⃣ Something to talk about — an instant icebreaker in every audition

Stop waiting for your big break to find you. Get your face out there.

As usual, the link to the video is in the comments 👇

#actingcareer #actorlife #commercialacting #actingtips #auditionadvice

CASTING CALL - VOLUNTEER
Hi all! We are casting for a short film, which is being created by a passionate crew of Capilano University alumni and students. 

This call is for the following 7 roles attached. 

It is volunteer and will be required for 1 day among the 4 dates listed below. If you already know that only a certain day will work among those, please let us know which. 

This film is art heavy, and some of the characters may be bearing quite a bit of make up.

If you are interested please email or DM me your headshots, mention which of the characters you are interested in (one or more), and if you have an acting reel, send that over aswell:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com

@arjungillfilm

P.S. If you are interested in the lead role, that call was posted in the group yesterday if you’d like to check it out.

items.text:
Casting Vancouver-based performers for Human Pinball Live, a paid, nonunion development workshop and staged proof-of-concept based on an original half-hour comedy-drama pilot.

The story follows Ren, a trans man revisiting a chaotic period of his life involving dating, identity, police encounters, sobriety, and the gap between how events felt at the time and how he understands them now.

The live version will use minimal staging, direct address, voiceover, theatrical doubling, and fast transitions between past and present. This first phase is a small creative lab focused on testing selected scenes, character dynamics, pacing, and staging rather than mounting a complete public production.

**Roles**
PAST REN - Lead
Late 20s–early 30s. East Asian.

Ren before transition: magnetic, impulsive, defensive, resourceful, vulnerable, and funny under pressure. Open to actors of any gender identity who are comfortable portraying this period of Ren’s life.

PRESENT REN - Lead
Early 30s. East Asian trans man. Trans men and transmasculine actors strongly encouraged to apply.

Present Ren is sober, observant, controlled, dryly funny, hypervigilant, and constantly analyzing the gap between what happens and what it means.

Applicants may submit for either Ren role. Performers comfortable being considered for both may indicate that in their submission. Casting one actor in both roles is being explored but is not required.

MINA - Supporting Lead
Woman, late 20s–early 30s. Ethnicity open.

Warm, intelligent, expressive, emotionally candid, and slightly chaotic. Requires grounded conversational acting, natural chemistry, and subtle comic and dramatic instincts.

ENSEMBLE PERFORMERS - 2 Roles
Any gender, approximately 20s–50s. Ethnicity open.

Versatile performers who may portray police officers, baristas, servers, security personnel, hotel or rental-car staff, dates, and other supporting characters. Strong character instincts, grounded comic timing, physical storytelling, and the ability to shift quickly between roles are preferred.

**Compensation and Schedule**
Rate: $25 CAD per hour
Minimum: Three paid hours per scheduled workshop or rehearsal session
Location: Vancouver, BC
Union status: Nonunion
Initial schedule: Approximately 2–4 workshop or rehearsal sessions during July and August 2026, scheduled around cast availability

Additional staged readings, filmed material, rehearsals, or public performances may follow and will remain paid.

No travel or accommodation is provided. Applicants must be based in Metro Vancouver or able to work locally.

**Content**
No nudity or simulated sex.
The material includes mature language, references to dating, sexuality, alcohol and drugs, police restraint and arrest, and emotionally vulnerable autobiographical subject matter.

**HOW TO SUBMIT:**

**PLEASE EMAIL**

mls@pacificwest.com

**AND INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING:**
* Your name
* The role or roles you would like to be considered for
* Your location
* Acting résumé or brief experience summary
* Headshot or recent photo
* A link to an existing reel, self-tape, scene, or other performance footage
* General availability during July and August
* Please place HUMAN PINBALL CASTING - [ROLE] in the subject line.

A custom audition tape is not required for the initial submission. Shortlisted performers will receive a short scene for the next stage.
items.summary:
Casting Vancouver-based performers for Human Pinball Live, a paid, nonunion development workshop and staged proof-of-concept based on an original half-hour comedy-drama pilot.

The story follows Ren, a trans man revisiting a chaotic period of his life involving dating, identity, police encounters, sobriety, and the gap between how events felt at the time and how he understands them now.

The live version will use minimal staging, direct address, voiceover, theatrical doubling, and fast transitions between past and present. This first phase is a small creative lab focused on testing selected scenes, character dynamics, pacing, and staging rather than mounting a complete public production.

**Roles**
PAST REN - Lead
Late 20s–early 30s. East Asian.

Ren before transition: magnetic, impulsive, defensive, resourceful, vulnerable, and funny under pressure. Open to actors of any gender identity who are comfortable portraying this period of Ren’s life.

PRESENT REN - Lead
Early 30s. East Asian trans man. Trans men and transmasculine actors strongly encouraged to apply.

Present Ren is sober, observant, controlled, dryly funny, hypervigilant, and constantly analyzing the gap between what happens and what it means.

Applicants may submit for either Ren role. Performers comfortable being considered for both may indicate that in their submission. Casting one actor in both roles is being explored but is not required.

MINA - Supporting Lead
Woman, late 20s–early 30s. Ethnicity open.

Warm, intelligent, expressive, emotionally candid, and slightly chaotic. Requires grounded conversational acting, natural chemistry, and subtle comic and dramatic instincts.

ENSEMBLE PERFORMERS - 2 Roles
Any gender, approximately 20s–50s. Ethnicity open.

Versatile performers who may portray police officers, baristas, servers, security personnel, hotel or rental-car staff, dates, and other supporting characters. Strong character instincts, grounded comic timing, physical storytelling, and the ability to shift quickly between roles are preferred.

**Compensation and Schedule**
Rate: $25 CAD per hour
Minimum: Three paid hours per scheduled workshop or rehearsal session
Location: Vancouver, BC
Union status: Nonunion
Initial schedule: Approximately 2–4 workshop or rehearsal sessions during July and August 2026, scheduled around cast availability

Additional staged readings, filmed material, rehearsals, or public performances may follow and will remain paid.

No travel or accommodation is provided. Applicants must be based in Metro Vancouver or able to work locally.

**Content**
No nudity or simulated sex.
The material includes mature language, references to dating, sexuality, alcohol and drugs, police restraint and arrest, and emotionally vulnerable autobiographical subject matter.

**HOW TO SUBMIT:**

**PLEASE EMAIL**

mls@pacificwest.com

**AND INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING:**
* Your name
* The role or roles you would like to be considered for
* Your location
* Acting résumé or brief experience summary
* Headshot or recent photo
* A link to an existing reel, self-tape, scene, or other performance footage
* General availability during July and August
* Please place HUMAN PINBALL CASTING - [ROLE] in the subject line.

A custom audition tape is not required for the initial submission. Shortlisted performers will receive a short scene for the next stage.

items.text:
Short film seeking featured extras:
Good afternoon all. 

We are looking for a local family to be involved in a small scene for a short film shooting in Reading on Sunday 19th July! 

We need 3 generations of ladies, mum, grandma and little girl ideally aged 2-4 years old. 

The film is about a young pregnant woman coming to terms with losing her own mum and is heartwarming, sweet and inspirational. The scene is just our main character watching a family with the life she wants. 

If you’re interested and available and want more information - please contact us at on the email: Fern.toscasting@gmail.com for more information. 

We’re a low budget production but happy to pay expenses and a small fee for the right family ☺️

Fantastic cast and will only be needed for 30 mins! 

Thank you! X

items.text:
The craft of acting is harder than anything else you’ll ever train in… but we’re here to help you!

Using the Meisner & Method Techniques, you can learn how to fully trust yourself and your impulses. 

Want to train with us? We have weekly classes online and regular classes in person in Brighton. Drop us a message to book a free class audit 📩

The craft of acting is harder than anything else you’ll ever train in… but we’re here to help you!

Using the Meisner & Method Techniques, you can learn how to fully trust yourself and your impulses. 

Want to train with us? We have weekly classes online and regular classes in person in Brighton. Drop us a message to book a free class audit 📩

items.text:

items.text:
Poszukujemy bohaterek (kobiet) w rodzinnych relacjach w wieku 18-80 lat (szukamy na przykład: mamy z córką, babcia z wnuczką, siostry, kuzynki, ciocia z siostrzenicą, prababcia i prawnuczka, matka chrzestna i córka chrzestna, teściowa i synowa, bratowa i szwagierka, dwie szwagierki, stryjenka i bratanica itp.) do kolejnych odcinków nowego programu realizowanego dla stacji telewizyjnej.

1. Szukamy dwóch kobiet, których łączy autentyczna rodzinna relacja. Najważniejsze jest, aby była między nimi naturalna chemia, wspólna historia i swoboda w kontakcie ze sobą, bo będą wspólnie występować w odcinku i siebie wspierać w wyborach stylizacji.

2. Tematem odcinka będzie metamorfoza modowa. Nasze bohaterki, przy wsparciu stylistów, będą poszukiwać idealnego stylu dopasowanego do konkretnego wydarzenia.

3. Zdjęcia będą realizowane w lipcu i sierpniu w Warszawie i będą to całodniowe nagrania. Dokładne terminy są do uzgodnienia.

4. Wynagrodzenie, jakie proponujemy: 700 zł netto/osoba. Razem 2 osoby 1 400 zł netto (płatne w ciągu 1 dnia po nagraniach — BLIK/konto bankowe)

5. Szukamy osób, które nie są kojarzone z wcześniejszych udziałów w popularnych programach telewizyjnych, reality show czy serialach. Chcemy pracować z autentycznymi bohaterkami, z którymi widzowie będą mogli się utożsamić.

Dodatkowo zależałoby nam, aby po zakończeniu zdjęć uczestniczki nie pojawiały się przez około 2–3 miesiące w innych programach telewizyjnych lub serialach, które mogłyby wpłynąć na odbiór ich udziału w naszym formacie.

6. Będziemy potrzebowali krótkich filmów zgłoszeniowych od kandydatek. Program opiera się w dużej mierze na relacjach, emocjach i rozmowach z bohaterkami, dlatego bardzo zależy nam na osobach, które czują się swobodnie przed kamerą i potrafią naturalnie opowiadać o sobie.

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację dwóch osób:

1. Imię i nazwisko swoje oraz drugiej osoby

2. Rok urodzenia obu pań

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefony kontaktowe

5. Adresy e-mail

6. Wzrost obu pań

7. Link do swojego profilu na Facebooku oraz drugiej osoby

8. Krótki opis dotychczasowego doświadczenia

9. Krótkie nagranie video wraz z podstawowymi informacjami o relacji. Najlepiej, jeśli będzie to nagranie wspólnie dwóch pań.

10. Minimum po 1 zdjęć z każdej pań

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Program TV bohaterki

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w programie zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

Actors when auditioning for a role that resonates deeply with you, at what point do you consider the callback process excessive?

items.text:
Kick Ass Film Fest is gearing up for a massive Season 7, and we want YOU on our board. We are on a mission to build the future of indie film in our state, and we need your passion to make the 2027 Spring Festival our best yet.
What you’ll be doing: Helping us run epic Fall Meet & Greets (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder), organizing Spring screening premieres, and planning the ultimate Awards Show.
Why join?
    •    Compete anyway: You can still enter the competition!  You won’t be involved in the competition portion of planning the festival.  
    •    Level up with us: This is a volunteer role, but as we grow, there will be opportunities for these to turn into official, expanded positions.
Let’s unite the Colorado film scene. Who’s ready to make some magic? 👇 Drop a 🎥 in the comments if you want to learn more!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScSY-u1zenlnh8lXRaQi3Lr9O93x5Zg4Ca06YChhft1Db2saQ/viewform

sharedPost.text:
Kickass Film Fest is growing, and we’re looking for passionate creatives, film lovers, organizers, and community builders to join our volunteer board.

This volunteer team will help support the events leading up to our 2027 Spring Festival, including:

Fall Meet & Greet networking events (Pueblo, Springs, Denver, Boulder)
Spring screening premiere events 
Spring Festival Awards Show Planning
Note: You will not be part of the competition planning, but you can still participate in the competition.

This is a volunteer board, but as KAFF continues to grow, there may be opportunities to grow into official roles or expanded positions on a case-by-case basis.

If you want to help us for Kickass Film Fest Season 7 and help us build the future of independent film in Southern Colorado, we’d love to hear from you!

Apply here: https://forms.gle/SaF2u71YJhbFNXAq9

items.text:
Casting call: Short Commercial Spot - Lifestyle Scenes

Looking for multiple talent for a shoot coming up on Tuesday, July 21st for a local blood tech company. 

Location: Multiple Locations within 45 mins of Denver.  

Looking for: 
* Older couple (70+) 
* Mom with newborn - less than 6 months if possible 
* Triathlete/swimmer for open water swim (*do need to actually swim, just wearing a wetsuit and standing at the water’s edge)
* Doctor: 40-50 y/o, any gender
* Patient: 30-50 y/o, any gender
* 30-40 y/o Woman 

Timing: Still TBD, but each scene is 2 hours max on site 

Rate: $800 per role  

Digital/global/perp

If you are interested, please email me (rileyjhanlon@gmail.com) with info and pics - put Blood Anthem - Your Name in the subject. 

If you only have certain hours available during the day, please let me know. 

Thank you!

topComments.text: Product? That’s a really low rate for global perpetuity

items.text:
Hey all you cool cats & kittens!!! Come have some fun in the sun!!! 

CFVA Summer Bash!!!!! Woohooo!!!

Join us for the CFVA Summer Bash, Colorado's can't-miss summer networking event for the production and media arts community! Whether you're behind the camera, in front of it, or making the magic happen behind the scenes, this is your chance to connect with fellow creatives in a fun, relaxed setting. Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!! 

• Sunday, August 2, 2026, 4:00 PM

• The Buntport Theater, Denver, Colorado 

• [https://bit.ly/4gyGys7](https://bit.ly/4gyGys7?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaTlPemlkOXN3WkxKVHd4cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6OaTol4XZ4rCwvvURQbhMX_d9BLstM6AH34hykXpEpYnyGg71WvbCy7R_jGQ_aem_AvAJiHw9laj5e1AQsFRXtA) 

Why Attend?
* IT'S SO FUN 
* Expand Your Network
* Meet filmmakers, producers, directors, editors, writers, actors, crew members, content creators, and industry professionals from across Colorado.
* Discover New Collaborations
* Whether you're looking for your next project, your next client, or your next creative partner, Summer Bash is the perfect place to start the conversation.
* Strengthen the Colorado Artist Community - across the mediums!! Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!!
* Build meaningful relationships, share ideas, and help grow a stronger, more connected community throughout the state.
* Celebrate the Industry
* Take a break from production schedules and enjoy an afternoon with the people who make Colorado's media industry thrive.

Event Highlights

• Free Admission – Everyone is welcome, but registration is encouraged.

• Food Trucks On Site – Grab dinner or a snack from a selection of local food trucks offering a variety of delicious options for purchase.

• Indoor & Outdoor Venue – Stay cool and comfortable at the unique Buntport Theater. 

• Networking & Community – Make new connections, reconnect with familiar faces, and celebrate Colorado's vibrant production/performing arts industry.

Whether you're a longtime CFVA member, new to the industry, or simply curious about Colorado's creative community, the CFVA Summer Bash is a welcoming opportunity to meet new people, exchange ideas, and build relationships that can lead to future collaborations.

Register today and join us on August 2 for an afternoon of community, conversation, and connection. We can't wait to see you at the Summer Bash!

items.text:
Grüßt euch,                                                                   
ein 14-jähriges Kind mit viel Motivation und wenig Erfahrung im Schauspielbereich, sucht Schauspieljobs, um Erfahrungen zu sammeln, damit sie einmal ihren großen Traum, ein beliebter Schauspieler zu sein erfüllen kann. 
Sie sucht Jobs ausschließlich in Bayern, falls jemand helfen kann oder eine Firma oder einen Filmproduzer kennt, bitte bei uns melden. 
Sprachen: Englisch, Deutsch und Ungarisch.
Wir würden uns sehr freuen! 
Vielen Dank für das Zuhören.                                           
  
Liebe Grüße❤️
